在本文中，我们介绍了 HILOS，这是一个使用近存储处理来提高离线推理吞吐量的框架。 HILOS 的核心是靠近存储的注意力，它将内存密集型注意力操作卸载到近存储加速器，从而减少了系统互连的流量。基于对存储的关注，HILOS 融入了三项额外的优化。首先，协作式 X 缓存通过在卸载后利用可用的主机资源来最大限度地减少 KV 缓存 I/O。其次，延迟的 KV 缓存写回隐藏了存储写入延迟并减轻了存储写入放大。最后，内存高效的注意力加速器在 NSP 设备的资源限制内维持长序列的高吞吐量。我们在配备 16 个 SmartSSD 的真实系统上实施并评估了 HILOS。与最先进的基于卸载的推理框架相比，HILOS 的吞吐量高达 7.86 倍，同时能耗降低高达 85%。 HILOS 的源代码可在 https://github.com/hongsunjang/HILOS 获取。

items.title: Architecting Scalable Trapped Ion Quantum Computers using Surface Codes.
items.abstract: Trapped ion (TI) qubits are a leading quantum computing platform. Current TI systems have less than 60 qubits, but a modular architecture known as the Quantum Charge-Coupled Device (QCCD) is a promising path to scale up devices. There is a large gap between the error rates of near-term systems (10 -3 to 10 -4 ) and the requirements of practical applications (below 10 -9 ). To bridge this gap, we require Quantum Error Correction (QEC) to build logical qubits that are composed of multiple physical qubits. While logical qubits have been demonstrated on TI qubits, these demonstrations are restricted to small codes and systems. There is no clarity on how QCCD systems should be designed to implement practical-scale QEC. This paper studies how surface codes, a standard QEC scheme, can be implemented efficiently on QCCD-based systems. To examine how architectural parameters of a QCCD system can be tuned for surface codes, we develop a near-optimal topology-aware compilation method that outperforms existing QCCD compilers by an average of 3.8X in terms of logical clock speed. We use this compiler to examine how hardware trap capacity, connectivity and electrode wiring choices can be optimised for surface code implementation. In particular, we demonstrate that small traps of two ions are surprisingly ideal from both a performance-optimal and hardware-efficiency standpoint. This result runs counter to prior intuition that larger traps (20-30 ions) would be preferable, and has the potential to inform design choices for upcoming systems.
items.abstract_zh: 俘获离子 (TI) 量子位是领先的量子计算平台。当前 TI 系统的量子位数量不足 60 个，但称为量子电荷耦合器件 (QCCD) 的模块化架构是扩大器件规模的一条有前途的途径。近期系统的错误率（10 -3 至10 -4 ）与实际应用的要求（10 -9 以下）存在较大差距。为了弥补这一差距，我们需要量子纠错（QEC）来构建由多个物理量子位组成的逻辑量子位。虽然逻辑量子位已在 TI 量子位上进行了演示，但这些演示仅限于小型代码和系统。目前尚不清楚应如何设计 QCCD 系统来实现实际规模的 QEC。本文研究了如何在基于 QCCD 的系统上有效地实现表面编码（一种标准 QEC 方案）。为了研究如何针对表面代码调整 QCCD 系统的架构参数，我们开发了一种近乎最佳的拓扑感知编译方法，该方法在逻辑时钟速度方面比现有 QCCD 编译器平均高出 3.8 倍。我们使用该编译器来检查如何针对表面代码实现来优化硬件陷阱容量、连接性和电极布线选择。特别是，我们证明，从性能优化和硬件效率的角度来看，两个离子的小陷阱都非常理想。这一结果与之前的直觉相反，即较大的陷阱（20-30 个离子）会更好，并且有可能为即将推出的系统的设计选择提供信息。

items.title: ICARUS: Criticality and Reuse based Instruction Caching for Datacenter Applications.
items.abstract:
Datacenter applications with huge code footprints suffer from front-end CPU bottlenecks even with a decoupled front-end. These applications are composed of complex system stacks with subtle interdependencies. One of the primary contributors to the front-end bottleneck is instruction misses at L2, which cause decode starvation. State-of-the-art L2 cache replacement policies, such as EMISSARY, utilize front-end criticality to identify instruction lines that cause decode starvation and attempt to keep those critical lines in L2. We observe that only 28.32% of the critical lines retain their criticality behavior, and a significant fraction of the critical instruction lines show dynamic behavior.

We propose ICARUS, an L2 replacement policy that incorporates branch history as context information to improve critical instruction line detection. We observe that the reuse distance of instruction lines varies based on the branch history that led to the instruction fetch. Next, we enhance the L2 replacement policy by considering both criticality and the reuse of instruction lines at L2, as we observe that the reuse behavior of critical lines differs from that of non-critical lines. On average, across 12 datacenter applications, ICARUS outperforms Tree-based Pseudo LRU (TPLRU) by 5.6% and as high as 51%. The state-of-the-art replacement policy, EMISSARY, on the other hand, provides an improvement of 2.2% over TPLRU. We demonstrate the robustness of ICARUS across various L1I and L2 cache sizes, as well as its effectiveness in the presence of hardware prefetchers.
items.abstract_zh:
即使具有解耦的前端，具有大量代码占用空间的数据中心应用程序也会遭受前端 CPU 瓶颈的困扰。这些应用程序由具有微妙相互依赖性的复杂系统堆栈组成。造成前端瓶颈的主要原因之一是 L2 处的指令缺失，这会导致解码匮乏。最先进的 L2 缓存替换策略（例如 EMISSARY）利用前端关键性来识别导致解码匮乏的指令行，并尝试将这些关键行保留在 L2 中。我们观察到，只有 28.32% 的关键线保留了其关键行为，并且很大一部分关键指令线显示出动态行为。

我们提出了 ICARUS，一种 L2 替换策略，它将分支历史记录作为上下文信息，以改进关键指令行检测。我们观察到指令行的重用距离根据导致指令获取的分支历史而变化。接下来，我们通过考虑 L2 指令行的关键性和重用来增强 L2 替换策略，因为我们观察到关键行的重用行为与非关键行的重用行为不同。平均而言，在 12 个数据中心应用程序中，ICARUS 的性能优于基于树的伪 LRU (TPLRU) 5.6%，最高可达 51%。另一方面，最先进的更换策略 EMISSARY 比 TPLRU 提高了 2.2%。我们展示了 ICARUS 在各种 L1I 和 L2 缓存大小上的稳健性，以及它在存在硬件预取器的情况下的有效性。

items.title: CREST: High-Performance Contention Resolution for Disaggregated Transactions.
items.abstract: Distributed transaction systems can leverage memory disaggregation for efficient resource scaling, yet they experience significant performance degradation under high-contention workloads. We present CREST, a disaggregated transaction system that efficiently manages high-contention transaction workloads in disaggregated memory architectures via three key techniques: (i) cell-level concurrency control, which achieves more fine-grained transaction concurrency than existing record-level approaches and reduces remote access latencies using a metadata-aggregated record structure; (ii) localized execution, which allows compute nodes to operate on local uncommitted results to reduce blocking time; and (iii) parallel commits, which parallelize commit operations under transaction dependencies. Evaluation shows that CREST achieves a throughput gain of up to 1.92× over state-of-the-art systems under high-contention workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式事务系统可以利用内存分解来实现高效的资源扩展，但在高争用工作负载下，它们的性能会显着下降。我们提出了 CREST，一种分类事务系统，它通过三种关键技术有效管理分类内存架构中的高争用事务工作负载：（i）单元级并发控制，它比现有记录级方法实现更细粒度的事务并发性，并使用元数据聚合记录结构减少远程访问延迟； (ii) 本地化执行，允许计算节点对本地未提交的结果进行操作，以减少阻塞时间； (iii) 并行提交，在事务依赖性下并行化提交操作。评估表明，在高竞争工作负载下，CREST 的吞吐量比最先进的系统提高了 1.92 倍。

items.title: Arm Weak Memory Consistency on Apple Silicon: What Is It Good For?
items.abstract: Weak memory models such as the Arm model are perceived as enabling higher performance than strong models such as TSO. We critically test this perception on Apple silicon CPUs, whose runtime-configurable TSO mode enables a direct comparison with native Arm mode. We find that Apple silicon TSO mode preserves Arm weak-memory optimizations, typically yielding execution times within 3% of Arm mode across modern applications and classic benchmarks. Although some applications experience higher TSO slowdowns, we trace these to artifacts of Apple's TSO implementation rather than inherent TSO ordering constraints. Our results challenge the perception that the Arm memory model offers a significant performance advantage over TSO in Apple silicon.
items.abstract_zh: Arm 模型等弱内存模型被认为比 TSO 等强模型具有更高的性能。我们在 Apple 硅 CPU 上严格测试了这种感知，其运行时可配置的 TSO 模式可以与本机 Arm 模式进行直接比较。我们发现 Apple 芯片 TSO 模式保留了 Arm 弱内存优化，在现代应用程序和经典基准测试中，执行时间通常比 Arm 模式低 3%。尽管某些应用程序经历了更高的 TSO 速度下降，但我们将其追溯到 Apple TSO 实现的工件，而不是固有的 TSO 排序限制。我们的结果挑战了人们的看法，即 Arm 内存模型比 Apple 芯片中的 TSO 具有显着的性能优势。

items.title: Reconfigurable Torus Fabrics for Multi-tenant ML.
items.abstract: We develop Morphlux , a server-scale programmable photonic fabric to interconnect accelerators within servers. We show that augmenting state-of-the-art torus-based ML datacenters with Morphlux can improve the bandwidth of tenant compute allocations by up to 66%, reduce compute fragmentation by up to 70%, and minimize the blast radius of accelerator failures. We develop a novel end-to-end hardware prototype of Morphlux to demonstrate these performance benefits which translate to 1.72x improvement in finetuning throughput of ML models. By rapidly programming the server-scale fabric in our hardware testbed, Morphlux can replace a failed accelerator with a healthy one in 1.2 seconds.
items.abstract_zh: 我们开发了 Morphlux，这是一种服务器规模的可编程光子结构，用于在服务器内互连加速器。我们证明，使用 Morphlux 增强最先进的基于环面的 ML 数据中心可以将租户计算分配的带宽提高高达 66%，将计算碎片减少高达 70%，并最大限度地减少加速器故障的影响半径。我们开发了一种新颖的 Morphlux 端到端硬件原型来展示这些性能优势，这些优势可将 ML 模型的微调吞吐量提高 1.72 倍。通过在我们的硬件测试台中对服务器规模的结构进行快速编程，Morphlux 可以在 1.2 秒内用正常的加速器替换出现故障的加速器。

items.title: FuseFlow: A Fusion-Centric Compilation Framework for Sparse Deep Learning on Streaming Dataflow.
items.abstract: As deep learning models scale, sparse deep learning (DL) models that exploit sparsity in weights, activations, or inputs and specialized dataflow hardware have emerged as powerful solutions to address efficiency. We propose FuseFlow, a compiler that converts sparse machine learning models written in PyTorch to fused sparse dataflow graphs for reconfigurable dataflow architectures (RDAs). FuseFlow is the first compiler to support general cross-expression fusion of sparse operations. In addition to fusion across kernels (expressions), FuseFlow also supports optimizations like parallelization, dataflow ordering, and sparsity blocking. It targets a cycle-accurate dataflow simulator for microarchitectural analysis of fusion strategies. We use FuseFlow for design-space exploration across four real-world machine learning applications with sparsity, showing that full fusion (entire cross-expression fusion across all computation in an end-to-end model) is not always optimal for sparse models—fusion granularity depends on the model itself. FuseFlow also provides a heuristic to identify and prune suboptimal configurations. Using FuseFlow, we achieve performance improvements, including a ~2.7x speedup over an unfused baseline for GPT-3 with BigBird block-sparse attention.
items.abstract_zh: 随着深度学习模型的扩展，利用权重、激活或输入的稀疏性和专用数据流硬件的稀疏深度学习 (DL) 模型已成为解决效率问题的强大解决方案。我们提出了 FuseFlow，一种编译器，它将用 PyTorch 编写的稀疏机器学习模型转换为融合稀疏数据流图，以实现可重新配置的数据流架构 (RDA)。 FuseFlow 是第一个支持稀疏操作的通用交叉表达式融合的编译器。除了跨内核（表达式）融合之外，FuseFlow 还支持并行化、数据流排序和稀疏阻塞等优化。它的目标是一个周期精确的数据流模拟器，用于融合策略的微架构分析。我们使用 FuseFlow 在四个稀疏的现实机器学习应用程序中进行设计空间探索，表明完全融合（端到端模型中所有计算的整个交叉表达式融合）对于稀疏模型并不总是最佳的 - 融合粒度取决于模型本身。 FuseFlow 还提供启发式方法来识别和修剪次优配置。使用 FuseFlow，我们实现了性能改进，包括与具有 BigBird 块稀疏注意力的 GPT-3 的未融合基线相比，速度提高了约 2.7 倍。

items.title: vCXLGen: Automated Synthesis and Verification of CXL Bridges for Heterogeneous Architectures.
items.abstract:
Compute Express Link (CXL) offers byte-addressable, cache-coherent remote memory accesses across multiple hosts. Unfortunately, the CXL specification lacks mechanisms to ensure safe interoperability between heterogeneous host architectures with diverse cache coherence (CC) protocols and memory consistency models (MCMs). This semantic gap poses fundamental challenges and a significant barrier to adopting CXL in modern heterogeneous data centers.

We propose CXL bridges, an abstraction that interposes between hosts and CXL to reconcile differences in CC protocols and MCMs. We present vCXLGen, the first system that automatically synthesizes and verifies these CXL bridges. We make two core contributions: (1) a fully automated approach to synthesize CXL bridges from machine-readable CC protocol specifications, and (2) a compositional formal verification approach for scalable model-checking of liveness properties.

Our evaluation shows that vCXLGen is general, i.e., it supports diverse protocols (both SWMR and relaxed consistency) and is easily extensible when integrating new protocols, such as CXL.mem. Our performance evaluations indicate that synthesised bridges achieve comparable results to manually designed homogeneous protocols. Finally, for correctness , our formal verification rigorously proves the safety and liveness of synthesized bridges, all while achieving significant scalability in liveness verification of complex heterogeneous systems.
items.abstract_zh:
Compute Express Link (CXL) 提供跨多个主机的字节可寻址、缓存一致的远程内存访问。不幸的是，CXL 规范缺乏确保具有不同缓存一致性 (CC) 协议和内存一致性模型 (MCM) 的异构主机架构之间安全互操作性的机制。这种语义差距对在现代异构数据中心采用 CXL 提出了根本性挑战和重大障碍。

我们提出了 CXL 桥，这是一种插入主机和 CXL 之间的抽象，以协调 CC 协议和 MCM 中的差异。我们推出了 vCXLGen，这是第一个自动合成和验证这些 CXL 桥的系统。我们做出了两个核心贡献：（1）一种从机器可读的 CC 协议规范合成 CXL 桥的全自动方法，以及（2）一种用于可扩展的活性属性模型检查的组合形式验证方法。

我们的评估表明，vCXLGen 具有通用性，即它支持多种协议（SWMR 和宽松一致性），并且在集成新协议（例如 CXL.mem）时易于扩展。我们的性能评估表明，合成桥实现了与手动设计的同质协议相当的结果。最后，为了正确性，我们的形式验证严格证明了合成桥的安全性和活性，同时在复杂异构系统的活性验证中实现了显着的可扩展性。

items.title: SLAWS: Spatial Locality Analysis and Workload Orchestration for Sparse Matrix Multiplication.
items.abstract:
Sparse matrix-sparse matrix multiplication (SpMSpM) is widely used in modern scientific applications, including high-performance computing, linear algebra, and graph processing. However, the highly variable distribution of nonzero elements in these matrices presents a significant challenge to computational efficiency. While existing sparse matrix accelerators often rely on specialized architectures tailored for specific dataflow, these designs sacrifice generality and fail to fully exploit potential data reuse opportunities.

In this paper, we propose Slaws, an efficient and general-purpose accelerator architecture for SpMSpM. This design accelerates computation by analyzing distinct sparsity patterns and leveraging various data reuse opportunities. We introduce two key strategies to address the challenges of different matrix operand positions. For the left multiplicand, we present a Pass-Aware strategy to analyze matrix structures, identify unique sparsity patterns, and optimize memory access. For the right multiplicand, we introduce a Shuffle-Compare strategy to dynamically balance the multiplication workload across computing units. By approximating the top- K outputs per cycle, this method minimizes idle time and ensures a balanced workload distribution. We implement both strategies in Slaws and conduct extensive experiments. The results show that Slaws achieves 1.46× and 1.43× speedups over two state-of-the-art accelerators, and 1.55× speedup over GPU.
items.abstract_zh:
稀疏矩阵-稀疏矩阵乘法 (SpMSpM) 广泛应用于现代科学应用，包括高性能计算、线性代数和图形处理。然而，这些矩阵中非零元素的高度可变的分布对计算效率提出了重大挑战。虽然现有的稀疏矩阵加速器通常依赖于针对特定数据流定制的专用架构，但这些设计牺牲了通用性，并且无法充分利用潜在的数据重用机会。

在本文中，我们提出了 Slaws，一种用于 SpMSpM 的高效通用加速器架构。该设计通过分析不同的稀疏模式并利用各种数据重用机会来加速计算。我们引入了两种关键策略来解决不同矩阵操作数位置的挑战。对于左被乘数，我们提出了一种 Pass-Aware 策略来分析矩阵结构、识别独特的稀疏模式并优化内存访问。对于正确的被乘数，我们引入了 Shuffle-Compare 策略来动态平衡计算单元之间的乘法工作负载。通过近似每个周期的前 K 个输出，该方法最大限度地减少了空闲时间并确保了平衡的工作负载分配。我们在色拉中实施这两种策略并进行广泛的实验。结果表明，Slaws 比两个最先进的加速器实现了 1.46 倍和 1.43 倍的加速，比 GPU 实现了 1.55 倍的加速。

items.title: ReliaFHE: Resilient Design for Fully Homomorphic Encryption Accelerators.
items.abstract:
The significant computational complexity of Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) has prompted numerous accelerator designs. However, existing FHE accelerators often implicitly assume that all computations are executed reliably, overlooking the fact that modern FHE schemes can be highly vulnerable to hardware faults: even a single-bit error in a ciphertext can cascade into widespread plaintext corruption.

In this paper, we present ReliaFHE, a resilient framework that integrates both storage- and computation-oriented protection for FHE accelerators. It leverages the large ciphertext polynomials inherent in FHE and employs lightweight, checksum-based schemes to construct efficient codewords. ReliaFHE is tailored to the three dominant arithmetic kernels: number theoretic transform, base conversion, and element-wise operations. Our evaluation shows that ReliaFHE improves reliability by more than 10 4 (in terms of primitive operations), with either ~1.5% performance overhead or ~1.9% area overhead. The parity storage overhead is below 1%.
items.abstract_zh:
全同态加密 (FHE) 的巨大计算复杂性促使了众多加速器设计。然而，现有的 FHE 加速器通常隐含地假设所有计算都是可靠执行的，而忽略了现代 FHE 方案极易受到硬件故障影响的事实：即使是密文中的一位错误也可能导致广泛的明文损坏。

在本文中，我们提出了 ReliaFHE，这是一个弹性框架，集成了面向存储和面向计算的 FHE 加速器保护。它利用 FHE 固有的大型密文多项式，并采用轻量级、基于校验和的方案来构造高效的码字。 ReliaFHE 针对三个主要算术内核量身定制：数论变换、基数转换和逐元素运算。我们的评估表明，ReliaFHE 将可靠性提高了 10 4 以上（就原始操作而言），性能开销约为 1.5%，面积开销约为 1.9%。奇偶校验存储开销低于 1%。

items.title: Static Analysis for Efficient Streaming Tokenization.
items.abstract:
Tokenization, also referred to as lexing or scanning, is the computational task of partitioning an input text into a sequence of substrings called tokens. Tokenization is one of the first stages of program compilation, it is used in natural language processing, and it is also useful for processing unstructured text or semi-structured data such as JSON, CSV, and XML. A tokenizer is typically specified as a list of regular expressions, which is called a tokenization grammar. Each regular expression describes a class of tokens (e.g., integer, floating-point number, variable identifier, string literal). The semantics of tokenization employs the longest match policy to disambiguate among the possible choices. This policy says that we should prefer a longer token over a shorter one. It is also known as the maximal munch policy.

Tokenization is an important computational task when processing semi-structured data, as it often precedes parsing, querying, or data transformations. Due to the abundance of large-scale semi-structured data, which can be too large to load in memory, it is desirable to perform tokenization in a streaming fashion with a small memory footprint. First, we observe that some tokenization grammars are inherently more difficult to deal with than others, and we provide a static analysis algorithm for recognizing them. We continue to propose the StreamTok algorithm, which relies on this analysis to enable efficient tokenization. StreamTok is asymptotically better than the standard algorithm of flex. Our experimental results show that our implementation of StreamTok outperforms state-of-the-art tools for tokenization.
items.abstract_zh:
标记化，也称为词法分析或扫描，是将输入文本划分为一系列称为标记的子字符串的计算任务。标记化是程序编译的第一阶段之一，它用于自然语言处理，对于处理非结构化文本或半结构化数据（例如 JSON、CSV 和 XML）也很有用。分词器通常指定为正则表达式列表，称为分词语法。每个正则表达式描述一类标记（例如整数、浮点数、变量标识符、字符串文字）。标记化的语义采用最长匹配策略来消除可能的选择之间的歧义。这一政策表明我们应该更喜欢较长的令牌而不是较短的令牌。它也称为最大咀嚼策略。

处理半结构化数据时，标记化是一项重要的计算任务，因为它通常先于解析、查询或数据转换。由于大量的大规模半结构化数据可能太大而无法加载到内存中，因此需要以较小的内存占用量以流式方式执行标记化。首先，我们观察到某些标记化语法本质上比其他标记化语法更难处理，并且我们提供了静态分析算法来识别它们。我们继续提出 StreamTok 算法，该算法依赖于这种分析来实现高效的标记化。 StreamTok 渐近地优于 Flex 的标准算法。我们的实验结果表明，我们的 StreamTok 实现优于最先进的标记化工具。

items.title: Efficient Remote Memory Ordering for Non-Coherent Systems.
items.abstract: Software using non-coherent interconnects like PCI Express requires fine-grained memory ordering, but current hardware mandates the use of costly source-side serialization. We show that this architectural mismatch severely limits the performance of two critical applications: (1) the transmission of network packets from a CPU to a NIC (requiring write-to-write ordering) and (2) key-value store lookups by an RDMA-enabled NIC (requiring read-to-read ordering). We address this by proposing a new destination-based ordering model and the hardware-software co-design comprising PCIe extensions and ISA extensions that allow software to express ordering intent efficiently. Novel microarchitecture at the Root Complex enforces these expressed semantics, eliminating source-side stalls. Our approach significantly improves the throughput of these application kernels and enables new, simpler protocols that outperform the state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh: 使用 PCI Express 等非一致性互连的软件需要细粒度的内存排序，但当前的硬件要求使用昂贵的源端序列化。我们表明，这种架构不匹配严重限制了两个关键应用程序的性能：(1) 将网络数据包从 CPU 传输到 NIC（需要写入顺序）和 (2) 支持 RDMA 的 NIC 进行键值存储查找（需要读取顺序）。我们通过提出一种新的基于目的地的订购模型和包括 PCIe 扩展和 ISA 扩展的软硬件协同设计来解决这个问题，使软件能够有效地表达订购意图。根联合体的新颖微架构强制执行这些表达的语义，消除源端停顿。我们的方法显着提高了这些应用程序内核的吞吐量，并支持新的、更简单的协议，其性能优于最先进的协议。

items.title: CounterPoint: Using Hardware Event Counters to Refute and Refine Microarchitectural Assumptions.
items.abstract: Hardware event counters offer the potential to reveal not only performance bottlenecks but also detailed microarchitectural behavior. In practice, this promise is undermined by their vague specifications, opaque designs, and multiplexing noise, making event counter data hard to interpret. We introduce CounterPoint, a framework that tests user-specified microarchitectural models — expressed as ?path Decision Diagrams — for consistency with performance counter data. When mismatches occur, CounterPoint pinpoints plausible microarchitectural features that could explain them, using multi-dimensional counter confidence regions to mitigate multiplexing noise. We apply CounterPoint to the Haswell Memory Management Unit as a case study, shedding light on multiple undocumented and underdocumented microarchitectural behaviors. These include a load–store queue-side TLB prefetcher, merging page table walkers, abortable page table walks, and more. Overall, CounterPoint helps experts reconcile noisy hardware performance counter measurements with their mental model of the microarchitecture - uncovering subtle, previously hidden hardware features along the way.
items.abstract_zh: 硬件事件计数器不仅可以揭示性能瓶颈，还可以揭示详细的微体系结构行为。在实践中，这一承诺因其模糊的规范、不透明的设计和多路复用噪声而被破坏，使得事件计数器数据难以解释。我们引入了 CounterPoint，这是一个测试用户指定的微体系结构模型（表示为“路径决策图”）的框架，以确保与性能计数器数据的一致性。当发生不匹配时，CounterPoint 会使用多维计数器置信区域来找出可以解释它们的合理微架构特征，以减轻多路复用噪声。我们将 CounterPoint 应用于 Haswell 内存管理单元作为案例研究，揭示了多种未记录和记录不足的微架构行为。其中包括加载存储队列端 TLB 预取器、合并页表遍历器、可中止页表遍历等。总体而言，CounterPoint 帮助专家将嘈杂的硬件性能计数器测量值与他们的微架构心智模型相协调，从而发现微妙的、以前隐藏的硬件功能。

items.title: Optimizer-Friendly Instrumentation for Event Quantification with PRUE Algorithm.
items.abstract:
Event quantification provides frequency information for runtime events and is widely used to build fast, secure, and reliable software and systems. It is usually achieved through instrumentation that introduces new instructions into programs but has significant runtime overhead. A key challenge in developing efficient instrumentation is that the instrumentation can barely benefit from modern compiler optimizations because the additional instructions introduce side effects that complicate the optimization process.

One intuitive idea to mitigate the side effect issue is to use local counters with transparent lifetimes and scopes instead of relying on global counters. Optimizations are more likely to succeed on instructions that manipulate local variables rather than global ones. However, this idea is not fully adequate, as local counters are unobservable to external users of the quantification data. Therefore, global counters are still necessary, and it is essential to determine when to update them based on the local counters. The challenge is that these updates also introduce side effects that hinder optimizations.

We address this update decision problem with the Partially Redundant Update Elimination (PRUE). We present Zircon, the first optimizer-friendly instrumentation to quantify runtime events. With the help of local counters, Zircon separates the event occurrence and the quantification by moving the instructions with side effects outside the scope where the optimizers apply. However, this separation introduces redundant instructions; the additional instructions would still be executed even without event occurrence. In other words, the lifetime control of the local counters challenges the efficiency of instrumentation. PRUE transforms the program and prunes away paths with redundant updates based on static analysis. The evaluation on the SPEC CPU 2017 shows that Zircon is up to 149% faster than state-of-the-art work, including SanCov and Nisse. Unlike existing efforts, Zircon does not compromise accuracy for efficiency; instead, it fully harnesses the power of compilation optimizers and delivers automatic performance gains.
items.abstract_zh:
事件量化提供运行时事件的频率信息，并广泛用于构建快速、安全、可靠的软件和系统。它通常是通过向程序引入新指令的插装来实现的，但会产生大量的运行时开销。开发高效仪器的一个关键挑战是，仪器几乎无法从现代编译器优化中受益，因为附加指令会带来副作用，使优化过程变得复杂。

减轻副作用问题的一种直观想法是使用具有透明生命周期和范围的本地计数器，而不是依赖全局计数器。优化在操作局部变量而不是全局变量的指令上更有可能成功。然而，这个想法并不完全足够，因为量化数据的外部用户无法观察到本地计数器。因此，全局计数器仍然是必要的，并且根据本地计数器来确定何时更新它们是至关重要的。挑战在于这些更新还会带来阻碍优化的副作用。

我们通过部分冗余更新消除（PRUE）来解决这个更新决策问题。我们推出了 Zircon，这是第一个优化器友好的工具，用于量化运行时事件。在本地计数器的帮助下，Zircon 通过将具有副作用的指令移到优化器应用的范围之外，将事件发生和量化分开。然而，这种分离引入了冗余指令；即使没有事件发生，附加指令仍然会被执行。换句话说，本地计数器的生命周期控制对仪器的效率提出了挑战。 PRUE 基于静态分析对程序进行转换并通过冗余更新修剪掉路径。对 SPEC CPU 2017 的评估表明，Zircon 比 SanCov 和 Nisse 等最先进的工作快 149%。与现有的努力不同，Zircon 不会为了效率而牺牲准确性；相反，它充分利用编译优化器的强大功能并自动提高性能。

items.title: Hardwired-Neuron Language Processing Units as General-Purpose Cognitive Substrates.
items.abstract:
The rapid advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs) has established language as a core general-purpose cognitive substrate, driving the demand for specialized Language Processing Units (LPUs) tailored for LLM inference. To overcome the growing energy consumption of LLM inference systems, this paper proposes a Hardwired-Neurons Language Processing Unit (HNLPU), which physically hardwires LLM weight parameters into the computational fabric, achieving several orders of magnitude computational efficiency improvement by extreme specialization. However, a significant challenge still lies in the scale of modern LLMs. A straightforward hardwiring of GPT-OSS-120B would require fabricating photomask sets valued at over 6 billion dollars, rendering this straightforward solution economically impractical.

Addressing this challenge, we propose the novel Metal-Embedding methodology. Instead of embedding weights in a 2D grid of silicon device cells, Metal-Embedding embeds weight parameters into the 3D topology of metal wires. This brings two benefits: (1) a 15× increase in density, and (2) 60 out of 70 photomask layers are homogeneous across chips, including all EUV photomasks. In total, Metal-Embedding reduced the photomask cost by 112×, bringing the Non-Recurring Engineering (NRE) cost of HNLPU into an economically viable range. Experimental results show that HNLPU achieved 249,960 tokens/s (5,555×/85× that of GPU/WSE), 36 tokens/J (1,047×/283× that of GPU/WSE), 13,232 mm2 total die area, 59.46 M-123.5 M estimated NRE at 5 nm technology. Analysis shows that HNLPU achieved 41.7-80.4× improvement in cost-effectiveness and 357× reduction in carbon footprint compared to OpenAI-scale H100 clusters, under an annual weight updating assumption.
items.abstract_zh:
大型语言模型 (LLM) 的快速发展已将语言确立为核心通用认知基础，推动了对专为 LLM 推理量身定制的专用语言处理单元 (LPU) 的需求。为了克服LLM推理系统不断增长的能耗，本文提出了一种硬连线神经元语言处理单元（HNLPU），它将LLM权重参数物理硬连线到计算结构中，通过极端专业化实现了几个数量级的计算效率提高。然而，现代法学硕士的规模仍然是一个重大挑战。 GPT-OSS-120B 的直接硬连线需要制造价值超过 60 亿美元的光掩模组，使得这种简单的解决方案在经济上不切实际。

为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了新颖的金属嵌入方法。金属嵌入不是将权重嵌入到硅器件单元的 2D 网格中，而是将权重参数嵌入到金属线的 3D 拓扑中。这带来了两个好处：(1) 密度增加了 15 倍，(2) 70 个光掩模层中有 60 个在芯片上是同质的，包括所有 EUV 光掩模。总的来说，金属嵌入将光掩模成本降低了 112 倍，使 HNLPU 的一次性工程 (NRE) 成本达到经济可行的范围。实验结果表明，HNLPU 在 5 nm 技术下实现了 249,960 个 token/s（GPU/WSE 的 5,555×/85×）、36 个 token/J（GPU/WSE 的 1,047×/283×）、13,232 mm2 总芯片面积、59.46 M-123.5 M 估计 NRE。分析表明，在每年权重更新的假设下，与 OpenAI 规模的 H100 集群相比，HNLPU 的成本效益提高了 41.7-80.4 倍，碳足迹减少了 357 倍。

items.title: BitRed: Taming Non-Uniform Bit-Level Sparsity with a Programmable RISC-V ISA for DNN Acceleration.
items.abstract: The non-uniform and dynamic nature of Bit-Level Sparsity (BLS) poses a critical load-imbalance challenge for parallel hardware accelerators. While the Bit-Interleaving paradigm, represented by state-of-the-art accelerators like Bitlet, shows promise, it is fundamentally constrained by a rigid datapath and severe inter-channel load imbalance. This paper introduces BitRed, an accelerator that embodies a new ''programmable adaptive bit-interleaving'' philosophy. Rather than a monolithic design, BitRed's core is an Adaptive-Sparse Processing Unit (ASPU) that deconstructs the acceleration process into a set of orthogonal RISC-V ISA extensions for pre-processing (cal.pre), adaptive distillation with dynamic load balancing (cal.adis), and PDP-optimal reduction (cal.red). By transforming a rigid hardware problem into a flexible scheduling problem, this ISA-based approach provides a fundamentally more adaptable and extensible solution. Empirical studies on a broad set of benchmarks highlight the following results (normalized to a SCNN baseline): (1) up to 9.4× speedup over the Bitlet, and 5.6× over the latest bit-serial SOTA BitWave; (2) up to 7.6× higher inference efficiency than Bitlet on representative models; (3) 5.072mm 2 area and scalable power consumption from 550.43mW (float32) to 495.12mW (16b) and 457.90mW (8b) @28nm TSMC; and (4) high versatility across precisions, and up to 18.9×13.5× higher than NVIDIA A100 and Jetson Orin 32GB, demonstrating significant competitiveness against GPUs.
items.abstract_zh: 位级稀疏性 (BLS) 的非均匀和动态特性给并行硬件加速器带来了严峻的负载不平衡挑战。虽然以 Bitlet 等最先进的加速器为代表的位交错范式显示出了前景，但它从根本上受到严格的数据路径和严重的通道间负载不平衡的限制。本文介绍了 BitRed，这是一种体现新“可编程自适应位交织”理念的加速器。 BitRed 的核心不是整体设计，而是一个自适应稀疏处理单元 (ASPU)，它将加速过程解构为一组正交 RISC-V ISA 扩展，用于预处理 (cal.pre)、具有动态负载平衡的自适应蒸馏 (cal.adis) 和 PDP 优化缩减 (cal.red)。通过将严格的硬件问题转化为灵活的调度问题，这种基于 ISA 的方法从根本上提供了更具适应性和可扩展性的解决方案。对一系列广泛基准的实证研究强调了以下结果（标准化为 SCNN 基线）：(1) 比 Bitlet 加速高达 9.4 倍，比最新的位串行 SOTA BitWave 加速 5.6 倍； (2) 在代表性模型上推理效率比 Bitlet 高出 7.6 倍； (3) 5.072mm 2 面积和可扩展功耗，从 550.43mW (float32) 到 495.12mW (16b) 和 457.90mW (8b) @28nm TSMC； (4) 跨精度高通用性，比 NVIDIA A100 和 Jetson Orin 32GB 高出 18.9×13.5×，与 GPU 相比具有显着的竞争力。

items.title: Ouroboros: Wafer-Scale SRAM CIM with Token-Grained Pipelining for Large Language Model Inference.
items.abstract:
Large language model (LLM) inference demands vast memory capacity and hierarchical memory structures, but conventional architectures suffer from excessive energy and latency costs due to frequent data movement across deep memory tiers. To address this, we propose a wafer-scale SRAM-based Computing-in-Memory (CIM) architecture that performs all LLM operations in situ within the first-level SRAM, eliminating off-chip data migration and achieving unprecedented energy efficiency. However, wafer-scale SRAM CIM presents multiple challenges due to the limited first-level memory capacity, which requires efficient compute-memory resource allocation.

To enable efficient LLM execution on this architecture, we propose three key innovations: Token-Grained Pipelining – Conventional sequence-level pipelining suffers from underutilization due to varying input sequence lengths and batching policies. We introduce a fine-grained token-level pipeline that mitigates sequence length variations, enhancing the utilization of CIM cores while minimizing the storage capacity required for activation. Distributed Dynamic KV Cache Management – KV cache storage occupies significant memory in LLM inference. We optimize on-chip KV caching by decoupling CIM memory from compute assignment, leveraging fragmented SRAM CIM memory within already-allocated cores for efficient KV storage, and reducing dedicated memory overhead. Communication-Aware and Fault-Tolerant Core Mapping – Efficient execution on wafer-scale CIM requires optimal mapping from transformer blocks to CIM cores to minimize inter-(pipeline) stage communication while ensuring intra-stage compute locality. We design a network-on-wafer-aware mapping strategy that places pipeline stages in close proximity while also distributing large layers efficiently across multiple cores. This mapping accounts for core-level defects, improving fault tolerance in wafer-scale deployment.

Experimental results demonstrate that Ouroboros achieves 4.1× average throughput improvement and 4.2× average energy efficiency gain over state-of-the-art systems, peaking at 9.1× throughput and 17× energy efficiency for the 13B model.
items.abstract_zh:
大型语言模型 (LLM) 推理需要巨大的内存容量和分层内存结构，但由于跨深度内存层的频繁数据移动，传统架构面临过多的能源和延迟成本。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于晶圆级 SRAM 的内存计算 (CIM) 架构，该架构可在一级 SRAM 内原位执行所有 LLM 操作，消除片外数据迁移并实现前所未有的能源效率。然而，由于第一级内存容量有限，晶圆级SRAM CIM面临着多重挑战，这需要高效的计算内存资源分配。

为了在该架构上实现 LLM 的高效执行，我们提出了三项关键创新： 令牌粒度流水线 – 由于输入序列长度和批处理策略的变化，传统的序列级流水线未能得到充分利用。我们引入了细粒度的令牌级管道，可以减轻序列长度变化，提高 CIM 核心的利用率，同时最大限度地减少激活所需的存储容量。分布式动态 KV 缓存管理 – KV 缓存存储在 LLM 推理中占用大量内存。我们通过将 CIM 内存与计算分配解耦来优化片上 KV 缓存，利用已分配内核中的碎片 SRAM CIM 内存实现高效 KV 存储，并减少专用内存开销。通信感知和容错核心映射——晶圆级 CIM 的高效执行需要从变压器块到 CIM 核心的最佳映射，以最大限度地减少（管道）级间通信，同时确保级内计算局部性。我们设计了一种晶圆上网络感知映射策略，该策略将管道级放置在非常接近的位置，同时还在多个核心之间有效地分布大型层。这种映射解决了核心级缺陷，提高了晶圆级部署中的容错能力。

实验结果表明，与最先进的系统相比，Ouroboros 的平均吞吐量提高了 4.1 倍，平均能效提高了 4.2 倍，13B 模型的吞吐量峰值达到了 9.1 倍，能效提高了 17 倍。

items.title: LAER-MoE: Load-Adaptive Expert Re-layout for Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Training.
items.abstract:
Expert parallelism is vital for effectively training Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models, enabling different devices to host distinct experts, with each device processing different input data. However, during expert parallel training, dynamic routing results in significant load imbalance among experts: a handful of overloaded experts hinder overall iteration, emerging as a training bottleneck.

In this paper, we introduce LAER-MoE, an efficient MoE training framework. The core of LAER-MoE is a novel parallel paradigm, Fully Sharded Expert Parallel (FSEP), which fully partitions each expert parameter by the number of devices and restores partial experts at expert granularity through All-to-All communication during training. This allows for flexible re-layout of expert parameters during training to enhance load balancing. In particular, we perform fine-grained scheduling of communication operations to minimize communication overhead. Additionally, we develop a load balancing planner to formulate re-layout strategies of experts and routing schemes for tokens during training. We perform experiments on an A100 cluster, and the results indicate that our system achieves up to 1.69x acceleration compared to the current state-of-the-art training systems. Source code available at https://github.com/PKU-DAIR/Hetu-Galvatron/tree/laer-moe.
items.abstract_zh:
专家并行性对于有效训练专家混合 (MoE) 模型至关重要，使不同的设备能够托管不同的专家，每个设备处理不同的输入数据。然而，在专家并行训练过程中，动态路由会导致专家之间的负载严重不平衡：少数超载的专家阻碍了整体迭代，成为训练瓶颈。

在本文中，我们介绍了 LAER-MoE，一种高效的 MoE 训练框架。 LAER-MoE的核心是一种新颖的并行范式——全分片专家并行（FSEP），它按照设备数量完全划分每个专家参数，并在训练期间通过All-to-All通信以专家粒度恢复部分专家。这允许在训练期间灵活地重新布局专家参数，以增强负载平衡。特别是，我们对通信操作进行细粒度的调度，以最大限度地减少通信开销。此外，我们开发了一个负载平衡规划器来制定专家的重新布局策略和训练期间令牌的路由方案。我们在 A100 集群上进行了实验，结果表明，与当前最先进的训练系统相比，我们的系统实现了高达 1.69 倍的加速。源代码可在 https://github.com/PKU-DAIR/Hetu-Galvatron/tree/laer-moe 获取。

items.title: Performance Predictability in Heterogeneous Memory.
items.abstract: Heterogeneous memory combining DRAM and CXL exhibits variable performance, yet existing metrics correlate weakly with actual slowdown. We present CAMP, a principled framework for predicting CXL-induced slowdown. Our key insight is that a DRAM run (plus a CXL run for bandwidth-bound workloads) exposes the causal microarchitectural pressure points where CXL latency translates into additional processor stall cycles. CAMP captures these signals using 12 performance counters to analytically decompose slowdown into three orthogonal components: demand reads, cache/prefetching, and stores. CAMP also introduces a closed-form model for software-based weighted interleaving that predicts performance across DRAM--CXL ratios. Across 265 workloads on NUMA and three CXL devices, CAMP achieves 91--97% prediction accuracy within 10% absolute error. We demonstrate that these models enable practical system policies, including ''Best-shot'' interleaving and colocated workload placement, improving performance by up to 21% and 23% over existing tiering and colocation approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 结合 DRAM 和 CXL 的异构内存表现出可变的性能，但现有指标与实际速度下降的相关性较弱。我们提出了 CAMP，一个用于预测 CXL 引起的减速的原则框架。我们的主要见解是，DRAM 运行（加上用于带宽限制工作负载的 CXL 运行）暴露了因果微架构压力点，其中 CXL 延迟会转化为额外的处理器停顿周期。 CAMP 使用 12 个性能计数器捕获这些信号，以分析方式将减速分解为三个正交分量：需求读取、缓存/预取和存储。 CAMP 还引入了基于软件的加权交错的封闭式模型，可预测 DRAM-CXL 比率的性能。在 NUMA 和三个 CXL 设备上的 265 个工作负载中，CAMP 在 10% 的绝对误差内实现了 91--97% 的预测精度。我们证明，这些模型可实现实用的系统策略，包括“最佳”交错和托管工作负载放置，与现有的分层和托管方法相比，性能分别提高了 21% 和 23%。

items.title: EARTH: An Efficient MoE Accelerator with Entropy-Aware Speculative Prefetch and Result Reuse.
items.abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models significantly reduce computation in large language models by activating only a subset of experts per input token, but they introduce severe memory bottlenecks due to the large number of expert parameters. Existing offloading and prefetching strategies either incur accuracy loss, prohibitively high memory traffic, or high decoding overhead, limiting deployment on resource-constrained hardware. In this work, we present EARTH, a hardware–software co-design that addresses these challenges through three key innovations. First, we propose a dual-entropy encoding scheme that decomposes each expert into a high-information base and a delta component, enabling compact storage while preserving accuracy via adaptive precision management. Second, we introduce a delta-aware speculative prefetching and reuse mechanism that preloads base components of predicted experts and selectively fetches deltas, reusing previously computed delta patterns to reduce memory traffic and redundant computation. Third, we design a hardware accelerator that is co-designed to efficiently support this encoding and prefetching strategy, optimizing execution order, parallelism, and memory utilization. Across representative MoE workloads, EARTH reduces data movement overhead, improves prefetch efficiency, and achieves up to 2.10× speedup compared to state-of-the-art baselines, while maintaining high model accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 专家混合 (MoE) 模型通过仅激活每个输入标记的专家子集，显着减少了大型语言模型中的计算，但由于大量的专家参数，它们引入了严重的内存瓶颈。现有的卸载和预取策略要么会导致准确性损失、内存流量过高，要么解码开销较高，从而限制了在资源受限的硬件上的部署。在这项工作中，我们提出了 EARTH，这是一种硬件软件协同设计，通过三项关键创新来应对这些挑战。首先，我们提出了一种双熵编码方案，将每个专家分解为高信息库和增量组件，从而实现紧凑存储，同时通过自适应精度管理保持准确性。其次，我们引入了一种增量感知推测预取和重用机制，该机制预加载预测专家的基本组件并有选择地获取增量，重用先前计算的增量模式以减少内存流量和冗余计算。第三，我们设计了一个硬件加速器，旨在有效支持这种编码和预取策略，优化执行顺序、并行性和内存利用率。在具有代表性的 MoE 工作负载中，EARTH 减少了数据移动开销，提高了预取效率，与最先进的基准相比，速度提高了 2.10 倍，同时保持了较高的模型精度。

items.title: TetriServe: Efficiently Serving Mixed DiT Workloads.
items.abstract:
Diffusion Transformer (DiT) models excel at generating high-quality images through iterative denoising steps, but serving them under strict Service Level Objectives (SLOs) is challenging due to their high computational cost, particularly at larger resolutions. Existing serving systems use fixed-degree sequence parallelism, which is inefficient for heterogeneous workloads with mixed resolutions and deadlines, leading to poor GPU utilization and low SLO attainment.

In this paper, we propose step-level sequence parallelism to dynamically adjust the degree of parallelism of individual requests according to their deadlines. We present TetriServe 1 , a DiT serving system that implements this strategy for highly efficient image generation. Specifically, TetriServe introduces a novel round-based scheduling mechanism that improves SLO attainment by (1) discretizing time into fixed rounds to make deadline-aware scheduling tractable, (2) adapting parallelism at the step level and minimizing GPU hour consumption, and (3) jointly packing requests to minimize late completions. Extensive evaluation on state-of-the-art DiT models shows that TetriServe achieves up to 32% higher SLO attainment compared to existing solutions without degrading image quality. TetriServe is available at https://github.com/DiT-Serving/TetriServe.
items.abstract_zh:
扩散变压器 (DiT) 模型擅长通过迭代去噪步骤生成高质量图像，但由于计算成本较高，尤其是在较大分辨率下，在严格的服务级别目标 (SLO) 下提供这些图像具有挑战性。现有的服务系统使用固定度的序列并行性，这对于具有混合分辨率和截止日期的异构工作负载来说效率低下，导致 GPU 利用率低且 SLO 达到低。

在本文中，我们提出了步骤级序列并行性，以根据各个请求的截止日期动态调整各个请求的并行度。我们推出了 TetriServe 1，这是一个 DiT 服务系统，它实现了这种高效图像生成策略。具体来说，TetriServe 引入了一种新颖的基于轮次的调度机制，该机制通过以下方式提高 SLO 的实现：(1) 将时间离散为固定轮次，使截止日期感知的调度变得易于处理；(2) 在步骤级别调整并行性并最大限度地减少 GPU 小时消耗；(3) 联合打包请求以最大限度地减少延迟完成。对最先进的 DiT 模型的广泛评估表明，与现有解决方案相比，TetriServe 在不降低图像质量的情况下实现了高达 32% 的 SLO 提高。 TetriServe 可从 https://github.com/DiT-Serving/TetriServe 获取。

items.title: I/O Analysis is All You Need: An I/O Analysis for Long-Sequence Attention.
items.abstract: As GPUs and other accelerators become increasingly popular, optimizing I/O operations between on-chip and off-chip memory is increasingly critical. I/O analysis, however, is complex, requiring a deep understanding of application dataflow and memory hierarchy. Developing a practical I/O analysis methodology remains a timely challenge. Self-attention is employed extensively in transformer models, but its quadratic memory complexity poses significant challenges to modern memory systems. In this study, we explore how to use I/O analysis to develop optimal solutions for accelerating exact long-sequence self-attention. We first introduce a novel I/O analysis for tall-and-skinny matrix-matrix multiplication, which captures the dominant data movement behavior of long-sequence self-attention. Guided by systematic I/O analysis, we develop AttenIO, an I/O-driven accelerator for exact long-sequence self-attention with three key optimizations: (1) an analytically derived I/O-optimal tiling and scheduling to minimize I/O operations, (2) fine-grained three-level communication-computation overlapping to hide I/O stalls, and (3) parallel execution patterns for efficient softmax. Our evaluation shows that AttenIO achieves a 1.6×-8.8× speedup over the state-of-the-art solutions. Although AttenIO is designed for self-attention, it also highlights the broader potential of I/O analysis as a principled foundation for guiding high-performance I/O optimizations.
items.abstract_zh: 随着 GPU 和其他加速器变得越来越流行，优化片上和片外存储器之间的 I/O 操作变得越来越重要。然而，I/O 分析很复杂，需要深入了解应用程序数据流和内存层次结构。开发实用的 I/O 分析方法仍然是一项及时的挑战。自注意力在 Transformer 模型中得到广泛应用，但其二次内存复杂性给现代内存系统带来了重大挑战。在本研究中，我们探索如何使用 I/O 分析来开发加速精确长序列自注意力的最佳解决方案。我们首先介绍一种新颖的高瘦矩阵-矩阵乘法 I/O 分析，它捕获了长序列自注意力的主要数据移动行为。在系统 I/O 分析的指导下，我们开发了 AttenIO，一种 I/O 驱动的加速器，用于精确的长序列自注意力，具有三个关键优化：(1) 分析得出的 I/O 最佳平铺和调度，以最大限度地减少 I/O 操作，(2) 细粒度的三级通信计算重叠，以隐藏 I/O 停顿，以及 (3) 高效 softmax 的并行执行模式。我们的评估表明，AttenIO 比最先进的解决方案实现了 1.6×-8.8× 的加速。尽管 AttenIO 是为自注意力而设计的，但它也强调了 I/O 分析作为指导高性能 I/O 优化的原则基础的更广泛潜力。

items.title: DFVG: A Heterogeneous Architecture for Speculative Decoding with Draft-on-FPGA and Verify-on-GPU.
items.abstract: Speculative decoding is a promising paradigm that accelerates LLM inference by generating drafts and performing verification. However, such systems still face three major challenges: (1) The imbalance in resource requirements between draft and verification models result in low utilization and energy inefficiency when deployed together. (2) Fixed-pattern token trees produce many candidates but few valid paths, resulting in redundant drafts due to the lack of full leverage of the inherent confidence in dynamic generation. (3) Asynchronous execution with frequent alternation between the two stages suffers from idle waiting and rollback overhead. To address these issues, we propose DFVG , a heterogeneous speculative decoding architecture that offloads draft generation to FPGAs and verification to GPUs, exploiting their complementary strengths. We introduce three key contributions: (1) Heterogeneous architecture design that partitions speculative decoding into FPGA-based drafting and GPU-based verification, exploiting complementary hardware strengths with an overlap processor for high-throughput execution; (2) Hardware-aware dynamic draft generation that dynamically predicts speculative branches and token lengths based on model confidence while considering hardware parallelism limits; (3) Tightly-coupled heterogeneous pipeline with stagedecoupled scheduling that allocates execution windows between stages, combined with lightweight cross-device alignment and rollback prediction strategies. Comprehensive evaluation on mainstream models (OPT, LLaMA, Qwen) demonstrates DFVG achieves up to 3.26× speedup and 5.8× energy efficiency improvement over existing approaches. The source code at: https://github.com/ShaoqiangLu/DFVG
items.abstract_zh: 推测性解码是一种很有前途的范例，它通过生成草稿和执行验证来加速 LLM 推理。然而，此类系统仍面临三大挑战：（1）草稿模型和验证模型之间的资源需求不平衡，导致部署在一起时利用率低、能源效率低。 (2) 固定模式令牌树产生许多候选路径，但有效路径很少，由于缺乏充分利用动态生成的固有置信度，导致冗余草稿。 (3) 两个阶段之间频繁交替的异步执行会遭受空闲等待和回滚开销。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 DFVG，这是一种异构推测解码架构，可将草稿生成任务转移到 FPGA，将验证任务转移到 GPU，从而充分利用它们的互补优势。我们介绍了三个关键贡献：（1）异构架构设计，将推测解码划分为基于 FPGA 的绘图和基于 GPU 的验证，利用重叠处理器的互补硬件优势来实现高吞吐量执行； (2) 硬件感知的动态草稿生成，根据模型置信度动态预测推测分支和令牌长度，同时考虑硬件并行度限制； (3)紧耦合异构管道，具有阶段解耦调度，在阶段之间分配执行窗口，并结合轻量级跨设备对齐和回滚预测策略。对主流模型（OPT、LLaMA、Qwen）的综合评估表明，DFVG 较现有方法实现了高达 3.26 倍的加速和 5.8 倍的能效提升。源代码位于：https://github.com/ShaoqiangLu/DFVG

items.title: SEVI: Silent Data Corruption of Vector Instructions in Hyper-Scale Datacenters.
items.abstract: Silent Data Corruption (SDC) poses a reliability threat in modern datacenters. These insidious errors evade detections and propagate incorrect results throughout the system. Companies including Google, Meta, and Alibaba have reported SDC incidents affecting their production. In this paper, we present the first comprehensive instruction- and application-level analysis of vector instruction SDCs in hyper-scale datacenters using a two-stage approach. We perform over 78 trillion test rounds in more than 14 billion CPU seconds. Our observations reveal undocumented SDC patterns that provide insights into possible underlying causes and inspire new mitigation strategies. Based on these findings, we propose a low-overhead SDC detection mechanism leveraging in-application algorithm-based fault tolerance. Our method achieves 88% to 100% SDC machine detection rate with a time overhead of only 1.35% even for modestly sized inputs.
items.abstract_zh: 无声数据损坏 (SDC) 对现代数据中心的可靠性构成威胁。这些潜在的错误会逃避检测，并在整个系统中传播错误的结果。谷歌、Meta 和阿里巴巴等公司都报告了影响其生产的 SDC 事件。在本文中，我们首次使用两阶段方法对超大规模数据中心中的向量指令 SDC 进行全面的指令级和应用程序级分析。我们在超过 140 亿个 CPU 秒内执行了超过 78 万亿次测试。我们的观察揭示了未记录的 SDC 模式，可以深入了解可能的根本原因并激发新的缓解策略。基于这些发现，我们提出了一种低开销的 SDC 检测机制，利用基于应用程序算法的容错能力。我们的方法实现了 88% 到 100% 的 SDC 机器检测率，即使对于中等大小的输入，时间开销也仅为 1.35%。

items.title: CacheMind: From Miss Rates to Why - Natural-Language, Trace-Grounded Reasoning for Cache Replacement.
items.abstract:
Cache replacement remains a challenging problem in CPU microarchitecture, often addressed using hand-crafted heuristics that limit cache performance. Cache data analysis requires parsing millions of trace entries with manual filtering, making the process slow and non-interactive.

To address this, we introduce CacheMind , a conversational tool that uses Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Large Language Models (LLMs) to enable semantic reasoning over cache traces. Architects can now ask natural language questions like, ''Why is the memory access associated with PC X causing more evictions?'', and receive trace grounded, human-readable answers linked to program semantics for the first time.

To evaluate CacheMind , we present CacheMindBench , the first verified benchmark suite for LLM-based reasoning for the cache replacement problem. Using the Sieve retriever, CacheMind achieves 66.67% on 75 unseen trace-grounded questions and 84.80% on 25 unseen policy-specific reasoning tasks; with Ranger , it achieves 89.33% and 64.80% on the same evaluations. Additionally, with Ranger, CacheMind achieves 100% accuracy on 4 out of 6 categories in the trace-grounded tier of CacheMindBench . Compared to LlamaIndex (10% retrieval success), Sieve achieves 60% and Ranger achieves 90%, demonstrating that existing RetrievalAugmented Generation (RAGs) are insufficient for precise, trace-grounded microarchitectural reasoning.
items.abstract_zh:
缓存替换仍然是 CPU 微架构中的一个具有挑战性的问题，通常使用限制缓存性能的手工启发式方法来解决。缓存数据分析需要通过手动过滤来解析数百万个跟踪条目，这使得该过程缓慢且非交互式。

为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 CacheMind，这是一种会话工具，它使用检索增强生成 (RAG) 和大型语言模型 (LLM) 来实现缓存跟踪的语义推理。架构师现在可以提出自然语言问题，例如“为什么与 PC X 相关的内存访问会导致更多驱逐？”，并首次收到与程序语义相关的基于跟踪的、人类可读的答案。

为了评估 CacheMind ，我们推出了 CacheMindBench ，这是第一个经过验证的基准套件，用于基于 LLM 的缓存替换问题推理。使用 Sieve 检索器，CacheMind 在 75 个未见的基于跟踪的问题上取得了 66.67% 的成绩，在 25 个未见的特定于策略的推理任务上取得了 84.80% 的成绩；与 Ranger 相比，在相同的评估中达到了 89.33% 和 64.80%。此外，借助 Ranger，CacheMind 在 CacheMindBench 跟踪层中的 6 个类别中的 4 个类别上实现了 100% 的准确率。与 LlamaIndex（10% 检索成功率）相比，Sieve 达到了 60%，Ranger 达到了 90%，这表明现有的检索增强生成（RAG）不足以进行精确的、基于跟踪的微架构推理。

items.title: HEPIC: Private Inference over Homomorphic Encryption with Client Intervention.
items.abstract: Homomorphic Encryption (HE) enables Private Inference (PI) in Machine Learning as a Service (MLaaS), protecting both client inputs and server-side neural network (NN) parameters. Existing PI techniques are predominantly implemented as either HE-based fire-and-forget methods or MPC-based interactive methods. Recent HE-based PI systems improve the accuracy--performance trade-off via a layer-wise scheme and parameter switching, yet remain bottlenecked by fire-and-forget execution in which the server alone performs costly ciphertext management (e.g., bootstrapping and scheme/parameter conversions). We present HEPIC, an HE-based PI system that explores a different design point by leveraging client interventions for ciphertext managements. In a sense, HEPIC shares a common ground with MPC-based PI of being interactive with the client, but differs in that the client only intervenes for ciphertext managements required in HE operations. Because ciphertext management has identical semantics on the client and the server, HEPIC lets developers decide where and how often to execute it, enabling fine-grained trade-offs among computation, communication, and ciphertext configuration. HEPIC makes such execution practical by overlapping client re-encryption, server computation, and communication via dependency-aware pipelining and streaming-based transfers. We further enhance the performance with a cache-aware task allocator (CATA) and a cost-aware client intervention scheduler (CACIS) to exploit ciphertext-level parallelism and to mitigate stalls under client-server performance disparity. Our evaluation shows that HEPIC achieves up to 2.20--41.93× speedup over state-of-the-art fire-and-forget HE-based PI, while maintaining zero loss in inference accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 同态加密 (HE) 支持机器学习即服务 (MLaaS) 中的私有推理 (PI)，保护客户端输入和服务器端神经网络 (NN) 参数。现有的 PI 技术主要以基于 HE 的即发即弃方法或基于 MPC 的交互式方法来实现。最近基于 HE 的 PI 系统通过分层方案和参数切换提高了准确性和性能权衡，但仍然受到“即发即忘”执行的瓶颈，其中服务器单独执行昂贵的密文管理（例如，引导和方案/参数转换）。我们推出 HEPIC，这是一个基于 HE 的 PI 系统，它通过利用客户干预进行密文管理来探索不同的设计点。从某种意义上说，HEPIC 与基于 MPC 的 PI 的共同点是与客户端交互，但不同之处在于客户端仅干预 HE 操作所需的密文管理。由于密文管理在客户端和服务器上具有相同的语义，HEPIC 允许开发人员决定执行位置和执行频率，从而实现计算、通信和密文配置之间的细粒度权衡。 HEPIC 通过重叠客户端重新加密、服务器计算以及通过依赖性感知管道和基于流的传输进行通信，使此类执行变得实用。我们通过缓存感知任务分配器（CATA）和成本感知客户端干预调度程序（CACIS）进一步增强性能，以利用密文级并行性并减轻客户端-服务器性能差异下的停顿。我们的评估表明，与最先进的基于 HE 的 PI 相比，HEPIC 实现了高达 2.20--41.93 倍的加速，同时保持推理精度零损失。

items.title: Cxlalloc: Safe and Efficient Memory Allocation for a CXL Pod.
items.abstract:
A Compute Express Link (CXL) pod is a group of hosts that share CXL-attached memory. A memory allocator for a CXL pod faces novel challenges: (1) CXL devices may not fully support inter-host hardware cache coherence (HWcc), (2) the allocator may be concurrently accessed from different processes, and (3) with more hosts, failures become more likely.

We present cxlalloc , a user-space memory allocator that addresses these challenges through careful metadata layout and new protocols to maintain cache coherence in software, coordinate memory mappings across processes, and recover from crashes. C xlalloc uses compare-and-swap (CAS) for efficient synchronization; to support CXL devices with no HWcc, we present a memory-based CAS (mCAS) primitive implemented in an FPGA.

Experiments with in-memory key-value store workloads demonstrate that cxlalloc retains competitive performance while enabling new use-cases. Experiments with a commercial CXL device show that cxlalloc can achieve 80% of its maximum allocation throughput using mCAS.
items.abstract_zh:
Compute Express Link (CXL) Pod 是一组共享 CXL 连接内存的主机。 CXL Pod 的内存分配器面临新的挑战：(1) CXL 设备可能不完全支持主机间硬件缓存一致性 (HWcc)，(2) 分配器可能会从不同进程同时访问，(3) 主机越多，失败的可能性就越大。

我们推出了 cxlalloc ，这是一种用户空间内存分配器，它通过仔细的元数据布局和新协议来解决这些挑战，以维护软件中的缓存一致性、协调跨进程的内存映射以及从崩溃中恢复。 C xlalloc 使用比较和交换 (CAS) 来实现高效同步；为了支持没有 HWcc 的 CXL 设备，我们提出了在 FPGA 中实现的基于内存的 CAS (mCAS) 原语。

对内存中键值存储工作负载的实验表明，cxlalloc 在支持新用例的同时保留了具有竞争力的性能。使用商用 CXL 设备进行的实验表明，cxlalloc 使用 mCAS 可以实现其最大分配吞吐量的 80%。

items.title: Parameterized Hardware Design with Latency-Abstract Interfaces.
items.abstract:
Hardware designs must use latency-insensitive (LI) interfaces when timing is input-dependent. When timing is input-independent, designs should use latency-sensitive (LS) interfaces for maximum performance. However, designs commonly use LI interfaces to integrate with externally generated LS modules--from, e.g., IP generators, high-level synthesis, or domain specific languages. In every fully integrated design, such uses of LI represent pure overhead. The challenge is that generators can dramatically change timing interfaces of the modules to meet performance objectives, and LI interfaces act as a useful design abstraction and enable timing adaptation.

We define latency-abstract (LA) interfaces, a new design abstraction, which provide the timing adaptability of LI interfaces at design-time and the efficient integration of LS interfaces. LA interfaces use output parameters, a novel compile-time mechanism for child modules to return values parent modules, to abstract and encapsulate timing behaviors at design time. During design elaboration, LA interfaces are compiled into efficient LS interfaces based on parameter values.

While an attractive option, LA interfaces inherit the complexities of parameterized hardware design: the user must reason how parameters influence timing behaviors of modules and ensure that designs adapt to interface changes. To address this challenge and demonstrate the utility of LA interfaces, we design Lilac, a parameterized HDL that uses a type system track the influence of parameters on timing behaviors and formally guarantee that every parameterization of an LA design results in a circuit without structural hazards. We demonstrate Lilac's efficacy by using it to implement parameterized designs and integrate designs generated from external tools. We show that LA designs use 26--33% fewer chip resources and achieve 6.8% better maximum frequencies than comparable LI implementations.
items.abstract_zh:
当时序依赖于输入时，硬件设计必须使用延迟不敏感 (LI) 接口。当时序与输入无关时，设计应使用延迟敏感 (LS) 接口以获得最大性能。然而，设计通常使用 LI 接口与外部生成的 LS 模块集成，例如来自 IP 生成器、高级综合或领域特定语言。在每个完全集成的设计中，LI 的这种使用代表了纯粹的开销。挑战在于生成器可以显着改变模块的时序接口以满足性能目标，而 LI 接口充当有用的设计抽象并支持时序自适应。

我们定义了延迟抽象（LA）接口，这是一种新的设计抽象，它提供了LI接口在设计时的时序适应性以及LS接口的高效集成。 LA 接口使用输出参数，这是一种新颖的编译时机制，用于子模块返回父模块的值，以在设计时抽象和封装时序行为。在设计细化过程中，LA接口根据参数值被编译成高效的LS接口。

虽然 LA 接口是一个有吸引力的选择，但它继承了参数化硬件设计的复杂性：用户必须推理参数如何影响模块的时序行为，并确保设计适应接口变化。为了应对这一挑战并展示 LA 接口的实用性，我们设计了 Lilac，这是一种参数化 HDL，它使用类型系统跟踪参数对时序行为的影响，并正式保证 LA 设计的每个参数化都会产生没有结构危险的电路。我们通过使用 Lilac 来实现参数化设计并集成外部工具生成的设计来展示 Lilac 的功效。我们表明，与同类 LI 实现相比，LA 设计使用的芯片资源减少了 26--33%，最大频率提高了 6.8%。

items.title: Neo: Real-Time On-Device 3D Gaussian Splatting with Reuse-and-Update Sorting Acceleration.
items.abstract: While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a promising technique for immersive AR/VR experiences, its practical adoption critically depends on whether real-time rendering can be achieved on resource-constrained devices, such as Meta Ray-Ban Display and Google Android XR Glasses. However, existing solutions struggle to achieve high frame rates, especially for high-resolution rendering. Our analysis identifies the sorting stage in the 3DGS rendering pipeline as the major bottleneck due to its high memory bandwidth demand. This paper presents Neo, which introduces a reuse-and-update sorting algorithm that exploits temporal redundancy in Gaussian ordering across consecutive frames and devises a hardware accelerator optimized for this algorithm. By efficiently tracking and updating Gaussian depth ordering instead of re-sorting from scratch, Neo significantly reduces redundant computations and memory bandwidth pressure. Experimental results show that Neo achieves up to 12.4x and 5.5x higher throughput than state-of-the-art edge GPU and ASIC solution, respectively, while reducing DRAM traffic by 94.6% and 81.4%. These improvements make high-quality and low-latency on-device 3D rendering more practical.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然 3D 高斯溅射 (3DGS) 已成为一种很有前途的沉浸式 AR/VR 体验技术，但其实际采用关键取决于能否在资源有限的设备（例如 Meta Ray-Ban Display 和 Google Android XR 眼镜）上实现实时渲染。然而，现有的解决方案很难实现高帧速率，尤其是高分辨率渲染。我们的分析表明，由于内存带宽需求较高，3DGS 渲染管道中的排序阶段是主要瓶颈。本文介绍了 Neo，它引入了一种重用和更新排序算法，该算法利用连续帧的高斯排序中的时间冗余，并设计了针对该算法优化的硬件加速器。通过有效跟踪和更新高斯深度排序而不是从头开始重新排序，Neo 显着减少了冗余计算和内存带宽压力。实验结果表明，Neo 的吞吐量分别比最先进的边缘 GPU 和 ASIC 解决方案高出 12.4 倍和 5.5 倍，同时将 DRAM 流量减少 94.6% 和 81.4%。这些改进使得高质量、低延迟的设备上 3D 渲染更加实用。

items.title: SNIP: An Adaptive Mixed Precision Framework for Subbyte Large Language Model Training.
items.abstract:
Training large language models (LLMs) efficiently while preserving model quality poses significant challenges, particularly with subbyte precision supported by state-of-the-art GPUs. Current mixed-precision training approaches either apply uniform precision to all GEMM operations or rely on heuristic-based methods that fail to generalize during training, leading to suboptimal convergence and instability.

To address these challenges, this paper introduces SNIP, a fine-grained adaptive mixed-precision training framework for LLM pretraining that supports subbyte precision. SNIP periodically collects statistics on activations, gradients, and optimizer states to assess the precision loss impact on model quality. We define two key metrics: loss divergence in the forward pass, caused by quantization-induced increases in training loss, and weight divergence in the backward pass, which measures error propagation through gradients affecting model updates. These metrics guide an Integer Linear Programming (ILP) problem that systematically optimizes layerwise precision to minimize overall quality loss while meeting efficiency targets. Experiments on 1B, 3B, 7B and 70B Llama-like models demonstrate that SNIP consistently outperforms existing baselines, reducing FLOPs by up to 80% while preserving model quality across different model sizes and training phases with minimal computational overhead.
items.abstract_zh:
在保持模型质量的同时高效训练大型语言模型 (LLM) 带来了重大挑战，特别是在最先进的 GPU 支持的亚字节精度的情况下。当前的混合精度训练方法要么对所有 GEMM 操作应用统一的精度，要么依赖基于启发式的方法，而这些方法在训练过程中无法泛化，从而导致收敛不理想和不稳定。

为了应对这些挑战，本文引入了 SNIP，这是一种支持亚字节精度的 LLM 预训练的细粒度自适应混合精度训练框架。 SNIP 定期收集有关激活、梯度和优化器状态的统计数据，以评估精度损失对模型质量的影响。我们定义了两个关键指标：前向传递中的损失散度，由量化引起的训练损失增加引起；以及后向传递中的权重散度，它通过影响模型更新的梯度来测量误差传播。这些指标指导整数线性规划 (ILP) 问题，系统地优化分层精度，以最大限度地减少总体质量损失，同时满足效率目标。对 1B、3B、7B 和 70B Llama 类模型的实验表明，SNIP 始终优于现有基线，将 FLOP 减少高达 80%，同时以最小的计算开销在不同模型大小和训练阶段保持模型质量。

items.title: Trinity: Three-Dimensional Tensor Program Optimization via Tile-level Equality Saturation.
items.abstract: Modern tensor program optimizers operate at two separate levels: graph-level optimizations (operator fusion, algebraic rewrites) and operator-level scheduling (tiling, parallelization). This separation prevents them from discovering cross-operator, tile-level optimizations that make hand-tuned kernels like FlashAttention effective. We present Trinity, the first tensor program optimizer that achieves scalable joint optimization through tile-level equality saturation. Our key insight is that optimal performance requires simultaneously optimizing three interdependent dimensions -- algebraic equivalence, memory I/O, and compute orchestration. To enable this, Trinity introduces a novel fine-grained IR that exposes all three axes as first-class, rewritable entities and applies equality saturation to perform scalable joint optimization. As a result, Trinity automatically discovers complex optimizations that require coordinated reasoning across all three dimensions. Across diverse Transformer variants, Trinity achieves up to 2.09× speedup over TensorRT and 2.35× over TorchInductor, both state-of-the-art production compilers.
items.abstract_zh: 现代张量程序优化器在两个独立的级别上运行：图级优化（算子融合、代数重写）和算子级调度（平铺、并行化）。这种分离使他们无法发现跨操作员、图块级优化，从而使 FlashAttention 等手动调整的内核变得有效。我们推出了 Trinity，这是第一个张量程序优化器，它通过瓦片级相等饱和来实现可扩展的联合优化。我们的主要见解是，最佳性能需要同时优化三个相互依赖的维度——代数等价、内存 I/O 和计算编排。为了实现这一点，Trinity 引入了一种新颖的细粒度 IR，它将所有三个轴公开为一流的可重写实体，并应用等式饱和来执行可扩展的联合优化。因此，Trinity 会自动发现需要跨所有三个维度进行协调推理的复杂优化。在不同的 Transformer 变体中，Trinity 比 TensorRT 实现了高达 2.09 倍的加速，比 TorchInductor 实现了 2.35 倍的加速，这两种编译器都是最先进的生产编译器。

items.title: Rage Against the State Machine: Type-Stated Hardware Peripherals for Increased Driver Correctness.
items.abstract:
Hardware provides driver authors both a strict specification of the operations a driver is allowed to do, and a highly permissive interface full of operations a driver can do. Authoring drivers that adhere to the provided hardware device protocol is challenged by dynamic definitions of what a driver should do based on the hardware's state. This is further complicated by increasingly capable hardware which may transition between states concurrently and independently from the software driver.

We present Abacus, a framework that statically prevents drivers from violating device protocols. Abacus refines type-states to model hardware-software concurrency and presents a formalization of hardware states into two families: stable and transient states. The Abacus framework provides a domain specific language for developers to encode device protocol invariants in tens of lines of code, and, using the generated Abacus type-states, statically prevents device protocol bugs. We demonstrate the Abacus framework's practicality by integrating it into drivers in two Rust OSes. We find that Abacus imposes minimal to no overhead in code-size and runtime performance, statically detects device protocol violations, and enables the usage of hardware features that would otherwise be prohibitively complex.
items.abstract_zh:
硬件为驱动程序作者提供了允许驱动程序执行的操作的严格规范，以及包含驱动程序可以执行的操作的高度宽松的接口。编写遵循所提供的硬件设备协议的驱动程序面临着基于硬件状态的驱动程序应执行的操作的动态定义的挑战。由于硬件能力越来越强，可以同时且独立于软件驱动程序在状态之间进行转换，这使得情况变得更加复杂。

我们提出了 Abacus，一个静态防止驱动程序违反设备协议的框架。 Abacus 改进了类型状态以对硬件软件并发进行建模，并将硬件状态形式化分为两个系列：稳定状态和瞬态状态。 Abacus 框架为开发人员提供了一种领域特定语言，可以用数十行代码对设备协议不变量进行编码，并且使用生成的 Abacus 类型状态静态地防止设备协议错误。我们通过将 Abacus 框架集成到两个 Rust 操作系统的驱动程序中来展示 Abacus 框架的实用性。我们发现 Abacus 在代码大小和运行时性能方面的开销极小甚至没有，静态检测设备协议违规，并允许使用原本过于复杂的硬件功能。

items.title: Lifetime-Aware Design for Item-Level Intelligence at the Extreme Edge.
items.abstract: We present FlexiFlow, a lifetime-aware design framework for item-level intelligence (ILI) where computation is integrated directly into disposable products like food packaging and medical patches. Our framework leverages natively flexible electronics which offer significantly lower costs than silicon but are limited to kHz speeds and several thousands of gates. Our insight is that unlike traditional computing with more uniform deployment patterns, ILI applications exhibit 1000× variation in operational lifetime, fundamentally changing optimal architectural design decisions when considering trillion-item deployment scales. To enable holistic design and optimization, we model the trade-offs between embodied carbon footprint and operational carbon footprint based on application-specific lifetimes. The framework includes: (1) FlexiBench, a workload suite targeting sustainability applications from spoilage detection to health monitoring; (2) FlexiBits, area-optimized RISC-V cores with 1/4/8-bit datapaths achieving 2.65× to 3.50× better energy efficiency per workload execution; and (3) a carbon-aware model that selects optimal architectures based on deployment characteristics. We show that lifetime-aware microarchitectural design can reduce carbon footprint by 1.62×, while algorithmic decisions can reduce carbon footprint by 14.5×. We validate our approach through the first tape-out using a PDK for flexible electronics with fully open-source tools, achieving 30.9\,kHz operation. FlexiFlow enables exploration of computing at the Extreme Edge where conventional design methodologies must be reevaluated to account for new constraints and considerations. FlexiFlow is available at https://github.com/harvard-edge/FlexiFlow.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出 FlexiFlow，这是一种用于项目级智能 (ILI) 的生命周期感知设计框架，其中计算直接集成到食品包装和医疗贴片等一次性产品中。我们的框架利用原生灵活的电子器件，其成本比硅低得多，但仅限于 kHz 速度和数千个门。我们的见解是，与具有更统一部署模式的传统计算不同，ILI 应用程序在运行生命周期中表现出 1000 倍的变化，在考虑万亿项部署规模时从根本上改变了最佳架构设计决策。为了实现整体设计和优化，我们根据特定应用的生命周期对隐含碳足迹和运营碳足迹之间的权衡进行建模。该框架包括：(1) FlexiBench，一个针对从腐败检测到健康监测等可持续应用的工作负载套件； (2) FlexiBits，面积优化的 RISC-V 内核，具有 1/4/8 位数据路径，每次工作负载执行能效提高 2.65 倍至 3.50 倍； (3) 碳感知模型，根据部署特性选择最佳架构。我们证明，生命周期感知的微架构设计可以将碳足迹减少 1.62 倍，而算法决策可以将碳足迹减少 14.5 倍。我们通过使用完全开源工具的柔性电子器件 PDK 进行首次流片来验证我们的方法，实现 30.9kHz 操作。 FlexiFlow 能够探索极端边缘的计算，必须重新评估传统的设计方法以考虑新的约束和考虑因素。 FlexiFlow 可在 https://github.com/harvard-edge/FlexiFlow 上获取。

items.title: Toasty: Speeding Up Network I/O with Cache-Warm Buffers.
items.abstract: Modern NICs DMA packets directly to the LLC using technologies like DDIO, reducing access latencies for networking applications. Prior work has observed several performance issues with DDIO when the working set of packet buffers does not fit into LLC. For example, the leaky DMA problem arises when incoming packets evict older packets that have not yet been processed by the application from LLC, causing them to be fetched again from main memory. While using a smaller pool of packet buffers that fits in cache is an obvious solution, this may result in the NIC running out of buffers to DMA packets into when a burst of packets arrives. This paper proposes Toasty, a system that mitigates this tradeoff between high throughput and resilience to packet loss that arises when sizing the network packet buffer pool. While prior work has proposed hardware-based solutions to this problem, Toasty is a software-only solution that can be deployed on commodity NIC hardware. Toasty manages the packet buffer pool as a LIFO stack instead of a FIFO queue, and adapts the number of buffers populated into the NIC hardware RX ring based on incoming packet load and application processing rate. Together, these changes enable Toasty to recirculate a small working set of cache-warm buffers in steady state, while falling back to a larger pool of buffers during traffic bursts. We implement Toasty over the AF_XDP kernel bypass framework, and our evaluation shows that Toasty improves network throughput for a variety of network functions by up to 78% over the default buffer pool implementation of AF_XDP. We also show that Toasty matches the performance of a small buffer pool that fits in cache, while being more resilient to traffic bursts.
items.abstract_zh: 现代 NIC 使用 DDIO 等技术将 DMA 数据包直接发送到 LLC，从而减少网络应用程序的访问延迟。先前的工作已经观察到当数据包缓冲区的工作集不适合 LLC 时 DDIO 的几个性能问题。例如，当传入数据包从 LLC 中驱逐尚未被应用程序处理的旧数据包时，就会出现 DMA 泄漏问题，从而导致它们再次从主内存中获取。虽然使用适合缓存的较小数据包缓冲区池是一个明显的解决方案，但这可能会导致 NIC 在数据包突发到达时耗尽 DMA 数据包的缓冲区。本文提出了 Toasty，这是一个系统，可以减轻高吞吐量和数据包丢失弹性之间的权衡，这种权衡是在调整网络数据包缓冲池大小时出现的。虽然之前的工作针对此问题提出了基于硬件的解决方案，但 Toasty 是一种纯软件解决方案，可以部署在商用 NIC 硬件上。 Toasty 将数据包缓冲池作为 LIFO 堆栈而不是 FIFO 队列进行管理，并根据传入数据包负载和应用程序处理速率调整填充到 NIC 硬件 RX 环中的缓冲区数量。总之，这些更改使 Toasty 能够在稳定状态下再循环一小部分缓存热缓冲区工作集，同时在流量突发期间回落到更大的缓冲区池。我们在 AF_XDP 内核旁路框架上实现 Toasty，我们的评估表明，与 AF_XDP 的默认缓冲池实现相比，Toasty 将各种网络功能的网络吞吐量提高了 78%。我们还表明，Toasty 与适合缓存的小型缓冲池的性能相匹配，同时对流量突发具有更强的弹性。

items.title: Mugi: Value Level Parallelism For Efficient LLMs.
items.abstract: Value level parallelism (VLP) has been proposed to improve the efficiency of large-batch, low-precision general matrix multiply (GEMM) between symmetric activations and weights. In transformer based large language models (LLMs), there exist more sophisticated operations beyond activation-weight GEMM. In this paper, we explore how VLP benefits LLMs. First, we generalize VLP for nonlinear approximations, outperforming existing nonlinear approximations in end-to-end LLM accuracy, performance, and efficiency. Our VLP approximation follows a value-centric approach, where important values are assigned with greater accuracy. Second, we optimize VLP for small-batch GEMMs with asymmetric inputs efficiently, which leverages timely LLM optimizations, including weight-only quantization, key-value (KV) cache quantization, and group query attention. Finally, we design a new VLP architecture, Mugi, to encapsulate the innovations above and support full LLM workloads, while providing better performance, efficiency and sustainability. Our experimental results show that Mugi can offer significant improvements on throughput and energy efficiency, up to 45× and 668× for nonlinear softmax operations, and 2.07× and 3.11× for LLMs, and also decrease operational carbon for LLM operation by 1.45× and embodied carbon by 1.48×.
items.abstract_zh: 值级并行（VLP）被提出来提高对称激活和权重之间的大批量、低精度通用矩阵乘法（GEMM）的效率。在基于 Transformer 的大型语言模型 (LLM) 中，除了激活权重 GEMM 之外，还存在更复杂的操作。在本文中，我们探讨了 VLP 如何使法学硕士受益。首先，我们将 VLP 推广到非线性近似，在端到端 LLM 精度、性能和效率方面优于现有的非线性近似。我们的 VLP 近似遵循以价值为中心的方法，其中重要的值被更准确地分配。其次，我们有效地优化了具有不对称输入的小批量 GEMM 的 VLP，它利用了及时的 LLM 优化，包括仅权重量化、键值 (KV) 缓存量化和组查询关注。最后，我们设计了一个新的 VLP 架构 Mugi，以封装上述创新并支持完整的 LLM 工作负载，同时提供更好的性能、效率和可持续性。我们的实验结果表明，Mugi 可以显着提高吞吐量和能源效率，非线性 softmax 操作分别提高 45 倍和 668 倍，LLM 分别提高 2.07 倍和 3.11 倍，并且还可以将 LLM 操作的操作碳减少 1.45 倍，隐含碳减少 1.48 倍。

items.title: Unicorns, Centaurs, and Cyborgs: Co-design Powering the Intelligence Era.
items.abstract: We are in the middle of a new ''intelligence revolution''. From consumer products to enterprise cloud offerings, and even foundational scientific research, Artificial Intelligence (AI) is fundamentally transforming all aspects of our life. These amazing advances have been made possible by equally impressive innovations in the underlying computing systems powering AI, but the continued pace of growth and change will require even more. In this talk, we will discuss vertically-integrated optimizations in AI infrastructure that have already birthed a new cottage industry of ''unicorns'', ranging from physical data centers & hardware to software and cloud solutions, and identify the exciting opportunities ahead. We will then look forward to future ''centaurs and cyborgs,'' symbiotic partnerships between human ingenuity and artificial intelligence, highlighting the opportunities and challenges when we use AI to optimize AI. Co-design and collaboration, across the hardware-software stack, across disciplines, and across communities, will be key to this exciting new future.
items.abstract_zh: 我们正处于一场新的“智能革命”之中。从消费产品到企业云产品，甚至基础科学研究，人工智能 (AI) 正在从根本上改变我们生活的各个方面。这些惊人的进步是通过支持人工智能的底层计算系统中同样令人印象深刻的创新而实现的，但持续的增长和变革步伐将需要更多。在本次演讲中，我们将讨论人工智能基础设施的垂直整合优化，这些基础设施已经催生了新的“独角兽”家庭手工业，从物理数据中心和硬件到软件和云解决方案，并确定未来令人兴奋的机遇。然后，我们将展望未来的“半人马和半机器人”，人类的聪明才智与人工智能之间的共生伙伴关系，强调我们使用人工智能来优化人工智能时的机遇和挑战。跨硬件软件堆栈、跨学科、跨社区的协同设计和协作将是这个令人兴奋的新未来的关键。

items.title: Arancini: A Hybrid Binary Translator for Weak Memory Model Architectures.
items.abstract:
Binary translation is a powerful approach to support cross-architecture emulation of unmodified binaries in increasingly heterogeneous computing environments. However, binary translation systems face correctness issues, due to the strong-on-weak memory model mismatch (e.g., from x86-64 to Arm/RISC-V) for concurrent programs. Besides, the current landscape of binary translation systems is fundamentally limited in terms of completeness for static systems and performance for dynamic ones.

To address these limitations, we propose A rancini , a hybrid binary translator system designed and implemented from the ground up that strives for correct, complete, and efficient emulation for weak memory model architectures. Our system makes three foundational contributions to achieve these design goals: ArancinIR, a unified intermediate representation for static and dynamic binary translators; a formalization of ArancinIR,'s memory model and formally verified mapping schemes from x86-6 to Arm and RISC-V, to ensure strong-on-weak correctness; and A rancini , a complete and performant hybrid binary translator, implementing the verified mapping schemes for correctness.

We evaluate A rancini using a multi-threaded benchmark suite with two backends (Arm and RISC-V), and show that A rancini can be up to 5× faster than QEMU--based translators while ensuring correctness and completeness.

To our knowledge, A rancini is the first hybrid binary translator whose implementation is guided by formal proofs, to ensure correct execution of strong memory guests on weak memory hosts. It is also the first translator to address mixed-sized accesses for Arm targets.
items.abstract_zh:
二进制翻译是一种强大的方法，可支持在日益异构的计算环境中对未修改的二进制文件进行跨架构模拟。然而，由于并发程序的强弱内存模型不匹配（例如，从 x86-64 到 Arm/RISC-V），二进制翻译系统面临正确性问题。此外，当前的二进制翻译系统在静态系统的完整性和动态系统的性能方面从根本上受到限制。

为了解决这些限制，我们提出了 A rancini ，这是一种从头开始设计和实现的混合二进制翻译器系统，致力于对弱内存模型架构进行正确、完整和高效的模拟。我们的系统为实现这些设计目标做出了三个基础贡献：ArancinIR，静态和动态二进制翻译器的统一中间表示； ArancinIR 内存模型的形式化以及从 x86-6 到 Arm 和 RISC-V 的形式化验证映射方案，以确保强弱正确性； A rancini 是一个完整且高性能的混合二进制翻译器，实现了经过验证的映射方案的正确性。

我们使用具有两个后端（Arm 和 RISC-V）的多线程基准套件来评估 A rancini，并表明 A rancini 的速度比基于 QEMU 的翻译器快 5 倍，同时确保正确性和完整性。

据我们所知，A rancini 是第一个混合二进制翻译器，其实现以形式证明为指导，以确保强内存访客在弱内存主机上的正确执行。它也是第一个解决 Arm 目标混合大小访问的翻译器。

items.title: Skyler: Static Analysis for Predicting API-Driven Costs in Serverless Applications.
items.abstract:
Unpredictable costs are a growing concern in serverless computing, where applications rely on cloud APIs with complex tiered pricing models. In many deployments, API calls dominate expenses, and a single overlooked design choice can escalate costs by thousands of dollars. Existing tools fall short: provider calculators need unrealistic manual estimates, and dynamic profilers only work post-deployment.

We present Skyler, a static analysis framework for pre-deployment cost estimation of API invocations in serverless workflows. Skyler models control flow behavior and pricing semantics to construct symbolic cost expressions using SMT formulas, exposing economic sinks, i.e., code paths where API usage disproportionately impacts cost. This enables developers to identify hotspots and prevent costly architectural errors early. Skyler supports JavaScript-based serverless applications across AWS Lambda, Google Cloud Functions, and Azure Functions, achieving high accuracy (mean absolute percentage error &#lt;1% for AWS and Google, 4.5% for Azure).
items.abstract_zh:
不可预测的成本是无服务器计算中越来越令人担忧的问题，其中应用程序依赖于具有复杂分层定价模型的云 API。在许多部署中，API 调用在费用中占据主导地位，而一个被忽视的设计选择可能会使成本增加数千美元。现有工具存在不足：提供商计算器需要不切实际的手动估计，而动态分析器只能在部署后工作。

我们提出了 Skyler，这是一个静态分析框架，用于对无服务器工作流程中的 API 调用进行预部署成本估算。 Skyler 对控制流行为和定价语义进行建模，以使用 SMT 公式构建符号成本表达式，暴露经济汇，即 API 使用对成本影响不成比例的代码路径。这使开发人员能够识别热点并尽早防止代价高昂的架构错误。 Skyler 支持跨 AWS Lambda、Google Cloud Functions 和 Azure Functions 的基于 JavaScript 的无服务器应用程序，从而实现高精度（AWS 和 Google 的平均绝对百分比误差 <1%，Azure 的平均绝对百分比误差 <1%）。

items.title: Enabling Fast Networking in the Public Cloud.
items.abstract: Despite a decade of research, most high-performance userspace network stacks remain impractical for public cloud tenants developing their applications atop Virtual Machines (VMs). We identify two root causes: (1) reliance on specialized NIC features (e.g., flow steering, deep buffers) absent in commodity cloud vNICs, and (2) rigid execution models ill-suited to diverse application needs. We present Machnet, a highperformance and flexible userspace network stack designed for public cloud VMs. Machnet uses only a minimal set of vNIC features that any major cloud provider supports. It also relies on a microkernel architecture to enable flexible application execution. We evaluate Machnet across three major public clouds and on production-grade applications, including a key-value store, an HTTP server, and a statemachine replication system. We release Machnet at https: //github.com/microsoft/machnet.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管经过了十年的研究，大多数高性能用户空间网络堆栈对于在虚拟机 (VM) 上开发应用程序的公共云租户来说仍然不切实际。我们确定了两个根本原因：(1) 依赖于商用云 vNIC 中缺乏的专用 NIC 功能（例如流量控制、深度缓冲区），以及 (2) 僵化的执行模型不适合不同的应用程序需求。我们推出了 Machnet，这是一种专为公共云虚拟机设计的高性能且灵活的用户空间网络堆栈。 Machnet 仅使用任何主要云提供商都支持的最小 vNIC 功能集。它还依赖于微内核架构来实现灵活的应用程序执行。我们跨三个主要公共云和生产级应用程序评估了 Machnet，包括键值存储、HTTP 服务器和状态机复制系统。我们在 https://github.com/microsoft/machnet 发布了 Machnet。

items.title: Chips Need DIP: Time-Proportional Per-Instruction Cycle Stacks at Dispatch.
items.abstract:
Despite continuous accelerator improvements, high single-thread performance remains crucial due to Amdahl's Law. With technology scaling slowing, developers must produce code that is as performant as possible, which often involves instruction-level performance analysis. Such analysis can be visualized as Per-Instruction Cycle Stacks (PICS), which, when created at the commit stage of the processor, report each static instruction's contribution to overall execution time and capture the performance events it was subject to. Sadly, PICS at commit (PICS C ) often cannot explain performance because they solely capture how effectively instructions egress from the processor core's out-of-order execution window. In contrast, developers must typically also gain insight into how efficiently instructions ingress into the execution window to fully understand application performance.

PICS C must hence be complemented by PICS at dispatch (PICS D ) because execution window ingress issues result in specific instructions exhibiting high dispatch latencies. We therefore propose dispatch-time profiling (DIP), which combines time-proportional at dispatch attribution policies with statistical sampling to accurately report each static instruction's contribution to dispatch time as well as list the reason(s) for delayed ingress. DIP is simple to implement and incurs low overhead, i.e., storage and execution time and overheads of 49 bytes and ~1%, respectively, while delivering high accuracy (average profile error of 5.2%). This is a significant improvement over the 26.9% error of state-of-the-art dispatch-tagging as implemented in AMD IBS, Arm SPE, and IBM RIS. We demonstrate that needing PICS D and PICS C is the common case by showing that 18 out of our 22 SPEC2017 benchmarks simultaneously exhibit both ingress and egress issues. Additionally, we leverage DIP's PICS D to optimize the fotonik3d benchmark, improving its performance by 8.5%.
items.abstract_zh:
尽管加速器不断改进，但由于阿姆达尔定律，高单线程性能仍然至关重要。随着技术扩展放缓，开发人员必须生成尽可能高性能的代码，这通常涉及指令级性能分析。这种分析可以可视化为每指令周期堆栈 (PICS)，当在处理器的提交阶段创建时，它会报告每个静态指令对整体执行时间的贡献并捕获其所经历的性能事件。遗憾的是，提交时的 PICS (PICS C ) 通常无法解释性能，因为它们仅捕获指令如何有效地从处理器核心的无序执行窗口发出。相比之下，开发人员通常还必须深入了解指令进入执行窗口的效率，以充分了解应用程序性能。

因此，PICS C 必须由调度时的 PICS (PICS D ) 来补充，因为执行窗口入口问题会导致特定指令表现出高调度延迟。因此，我们提出调度时间分析（DIP），它将调度归因策略的时间比例与统计采样相结合，以准确报告每个静态指令对调度时间的贡献，并列出延迟进入的原因。 DIP 实现简单且开销低，即存储和执行时间以及开销分别为 49 字节和约 1%，同时提供高精度（平均配置误差为 5.2%）。与 AMD IBS、Arm SPE 和 IBM RIS 中实施的最先进调度标记的 26.9% 错误率相比，这是一个显着的改进。我们通过展示 22 个 SPEC2017 基准测试中的 18 个同时表现出入口和出口问题来证明需要 PICS D 和 PICS C 是常见情况。此外，我们利用 DIP 的 PICS D 来优化 fotonik3d 基准测试，将其性能提高了 8.5%。

items.title: Co-Exploration of RISC-V Processor Microarchitectures and FreeRTOS Extensions for Lower Context-Switch Latency.
items.abstract: Embedded real-time systems must respond to external events within tightly bounded timeframes to ensure safety, correctness, and reliability. While Real-Time Operating Systems (RTOSes) ease the development of complex applications by providing abstractions for multi-tasked execution, they introduce overheads in the form of task switching latency and jitter, which impact timing predictability. Minimizing these effects is essential for reducing response times and enabling robust worst-case timing analysis. We present RTOSUnit, a configurable hardware acceleration unit designed to reduce context-switch latency and jitter in embedded real-time systems. By integrating the RTOSUnit into three RISC-V cores of varying complexity, we demonstrate its portability. Through a range of configurations, from lightweight scheduling acceleration to full context-switch and -preloading support, RTOSUnit achieves up to 76% reduction in mean context-switch latency and can be configured to completely eliminate jitter on selected cores. Area overheads in 22nm ASIC implementations range from negligible (within EDA tool heuristics noise) to 44\,%, with all configurations maintaining viable operating frequencies and power envelopes suitable for embedded systems. RTOSUnit offers a flexible and efficient, open-source. https://github.com/esa-tu-darmstadt/RTOSUnit_Integration foundation for hardware-assisted real-time scheduling, paving the way for broader integration into future embedded SoCs.
