items.abstract_zh: 嵌入式实时系统必须在严格限制的时间范围内响应外部事件，以确保安全性、正确性和可靠性。虽然实时操作系统 (RTOS) 通过提供多任务执行的抽象来简化复杂应用程序的开发，但它们会以任务切换延迟和抖动的形式引入开销，从而影响时序可预测性。最大限度地减少这些影响对于缩短响应时间和实现稳健的最坏情况时序分析至关重要。我们推出了 RTOSUnit，这是一种可配置的硬件加速单元，旨在减少嵌入式实时系统中的上下文切换延迟和抖动。通过将 RTOSUnit 集成到三个不同复杂度的 RISC-V 内核中，我们展示了其可移植性。通过一系列配置，从轻量级调度加速到全面的上下文切换和预加载支持，RTOSUnit 可将平均上下文切换延迟降低高达 76%，并且可以配置为完全消除所选内核上的抖动。 22nm ASIC 实现中的面积开销范围从可忽略不计（在 EDA 工具启发式噪声内）到 44%，所有配置都保持适合嵌入式系统的可行工作频率和功率包络。 RTOSUnit 提供了灵活、高效、开源的。 https://github.com/esa-tu-darmstadt/RTOSUnit_硬件辅助实时调度的集成基础，为更广泛地集成到未来嵌入式 SoC 中铺平了道路。

items.title: CHEHAB RL: Learning to Optimize Fully Homomorphic Encryption Computations.
items.abstract: Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) enables computations directly on encrypted data, but its high computational cost remains a significant barrier. Writing efficient FHE code is a complex task requiring cryptographic expertise, and finding the optimal sequence of program transformations is often intractable. In this paper, we propose CHEHAB RL, a novel framework that leverages deep reinforcement learning (RL) to automate FHE code optimization. Instead of relying on predefined heuristics or combinatorial search, our method trains an RL agent to learn an effective policy for applying a sequence of rewriting rules to automatically vectorize scalar FHE code while reducing instruction latency and noise growth. The proposed approach supports the optimization of both structured and unstructured code. To train the agent, we synthesize a diverse dataset of computations using a large language model (LLM). We integrate our proposed approach into the CHEHAB FHE compiler and evaluate it on a suite of benchmarks, comparing its performance against Coyote, a state-of-the-art vectorizing FHE compiler. The results show that our approach generates code that is 5.3× faster in execution, accumulates 2.54× less noise, while the compilation process itself is 27.9× faster than Coyote (geometric means).
items.abstract_zh: 完全同态加密（FHE）可以直接对加密数据进行计算，但其高计算成本仍然是一个重大障碍。编写高效的 FHE 代码是一项复杂的任务，需要密码专业知识，并且找到程序转换的最佳序列通常很棘手。在本文中，我们提出了 CHEHAB RL，这是一种利用深度强化学习 (RL) 来自动化 FHE 代码优化的新颖框架。我们的方法不依赖预定义的启发式或组合搜索，而是训练 RL 代理来学习有效的策略，以应用一系列重写规则来自动矢量化标量 FHE 代码，同时减少指令延迟和噪声增长。所提出的方法支持结构化和非结构化代码的优化。为了训练代理，我们使用大型语言模型（LLM）合成了多样化的计算数据集。我们将我们提出的方法集成到 CHEHAB FHE 编译器中，并在一系列基准测试中对其进行评估，将其性能与最先进的矢量化 FHE 编译器 Coyote 进行比较。结果表明，我们的方法生成的代码执行速度快 5.3 倍，累积的噪声减少 2.54 倍，而编译过程本身比 Coyote 快 27.9 倍（几何平均值）。

items.title: FlashMem: Supporting Modern DNN Workloads on Mobile with GPU Memory Hierarchy Optimizations.
items.abstract: The increasing size and complexity of modern deep neural networks (DNNs) pose significant challenges for on-device inference on mobile GPUs, with limited memory and computational resources. Existing DNN acceleration frameworks primarily deploy a weight preloading strategy, where all model parameters are loaded into memory before execution on mobile GPUs. We posit that this approach is not adequate for modern DNN workloads that comprise very large model(s) and possibly execution of several distinct models in succession. In this work, we introduce FlashMem, a memory streaming framework designed to efficiently execute large-scale modern DNNs and multi-DNN workloads while minimizing memory consumption and reducing inference latency. Instead of fully preloading weights, FlashMem statically determines model loading schedules and dynamically streams them on demand, leveraging 2.5D texture memory to minimize data transformations and improve execution efficiency. Experimental results on 11 models demonstrate that FlashMem achieves 2.0× to 8.4× memory reduction and 1.7× to 75.0× speedup compared to existing frameworks, enabling efficient execution of large-scale models and multi-DNN support on resource-constrained mobile GPUs.
items.abstract_zh: 现代深度神经网络 (DNN) 的规模和复杂性不断增加，对内存和计算资源有限的移动 GPU 上的设备端推理提出了重大挑战。现有的 DNN 加速框架主要部署权重预加载策略，即所有模型参数在移动 GPU 上执行之前加载到内存中。我们认为这种方法不足以满足包含非常大的模型并且可能连续执行多个不同模型的现代 DNN 工作负载。在这项工作中，我们引入了 FlashMem，这是一种内存流框架，旨在高效执行大规模现代 DNN 和多 DNN 工作负载，同时最大限度地减少内存消耗并减少推理延迟。 FlashMem 不是完全预加载权重，而是静态确定模型加载计划并按需动态流式传输，利用 2.5D 纹理内存最大限度地减少数据转换并提高执行效率。 11个模型的实验结果表明，与现有框架相比，FlashMem实现了2.0×至8.4×的内存减少和1.7×至75.0×的加速，从而能够在资源有限的移动GPU上高效执行大规模模型和多DNN支持。

items.title: Streaming Tensor Programs: A Streaming Abstraction for Dynamic Parallelism.
items.abstract: Dynamic behaviors are becoming prevalent in tensor applications, like machine learning, where many widely used models contain data-dependent tensor shapes and control flow. However, the limited expressiveness of prior programming abstractions for spatial dataflow accelerators (SDAs) forces these dynamic behaviors to be implemented statically and/or unoptimized. To address these challenges, we present Streaming Tensor Programs (STeP), a streaming abstraction that enables dynamic tensor workloads to run efficiently on SDAs. STeP introduces flexible routing operators, an explicit memory hierarchy, and symbolic-shape semantics that expose dynamic data rates and tensor dimensions. These capabilities unlock new optimizations, like dynamic tiling, dynamic parallelization, and configuration time-multiplexing, that adapt SDA execution to dynamic behaviors while preserving dataflow efficiency. Using a cycle-approximate simulator on representative LLM layers and a full model with real-world traces, STeP enables: dynamic tiling that breaks the Pareto-optimal frontier from prior work, dynamic parallelization that improves latency by ~2.72x, and configuration time-multiplexing that increases compute utilization by ~2.64x over prior SDA abstractions and their implementations.
items.abstract_zh: 动态行为在张量应用中变得越来越普遍，例如机器学习，其中许多广泛使用的模型包含依赖于数据的张量形状和控制流。然而，空间数据流加速器（SDA）的现有编程抽象的表达能力有限，迫使这些动态行为必须静态实现和/或未优化。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了流式张量程序 (STeP)，这是一种流式抽象，使动态张量工作负载能够在 SDA 上高效运行。 STeP 引入了灵活的路由运算符、显式内存层次结构以及公开动态数据速率和张量维度的符号形状语义。这些功能开启了新的优化，例如动态平铺、动态并行化和配置时间复用，使 SDA 执行适应动态行为，同时保持数据流效率。 STeP 在代表性 LLM 层上使用周期近似模拟器以及具有真实世界轨迹的完整模型，可以实现：打破先前工作中帕累托最优边界的动态平铺、将延迟提高约 2.72 倍的动态并行化以及将计算利用率比之前的 SDA 抽象及其实现提高约 2.64 倍的配置时间复用。

items.title: TierX: A Simulation Framework for Multi-tier BCI System Design Evaluation and Exploration.
items.abstract: Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) have made remarkable progress in recent years, driven by advances in neuroscience and clinical applications. For practical use, underlying processing systems must meet strict latency and power budgets. However, existing BCI systems typically rely on a single processing node to handle the entire workload, making it difficult to satisfy these budgets across diverse applications. In this work, we present TierX, the first simulation framework for design space exploration of multi-tier BCI systems. TierX models heterogeneous processing nodes across tiers, including implanted processors, body-attached devices, and external servers, together with diverse communication and powering methods. It navigates the extensive design space to identify optimal (1) workload partitioning options and (2) system configurations that leverage the strengths of each tier. We validate TierX on representative system configurations and demonstrate its effectiveness across diverse use cases.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，在神经科学和临床应用进步的推动下，脑机接口（BCIs）取得了显着进展。为了实际使用，底层处理系统必须满足严格的延迟和功率预算。然而，现有的 BCI 系统通常依赖单个处理节点来处理整个工作负载，因此很难满足不同应用程序的这些预算。在这项工作中，我们提出了 TierX，这是第一个用于多层 BCI 系统设计空间探索的仿真框架。 TierX 对跨层的异构处理节点进行建模，包括植入式处理器、人体附着设备和外部服务器，以及不同的通信和供电方法。它在广泛的设计空间中进行导航，以确定最佳的 (1) 工作负载分区选项和 (2) 利用各层优势的系统配置。我们在代表性系统配置上验证 TierX，并在不同的用例中展示其有效性。

items.title: oFFN: Outlier and Neuron-aware Structured FFN for Fast yet Accurate LLM Inference.
items.abstract:
With the advent of large-scale language models (LLMs), various optimization techniques have been proposed to enable efficient inference. Among these, methods that aggressively exploit output activation sparsity have attracted significant attention, which leverage ReLU-fied LLMs and skip the entire memory accesses as well as the computation for the output element if it was predicted as sparse. Achieving fast and accurate prediction of output activation sparsity is crucial to enhancing inference efficiency. However, in practice, phenomena such as activation outliers and hot and cold neurons, which significantly affect the exploitation of sparsity during LLM inference, have either been addressed individually or not structurally integrated in existing work.

In this paper, we reveal that these two phenomena are closely related and propose a novel FFN architecture called oFFN (Outlier-aware Structured FFN) that effectively exploits them simultaneously. The proposed method rearranges the FFN weights in both row and column dimensions to enable efficient and accurate prediction of output sparsity, considering outliers, and to enable separation of hot and cold neurons, computing them with respective optimal operations. The proposed method allows for the optimal computation path for each neuron, even when the batch size dynamically changes. Compared to existing sparsity prediction techniques, our method achieves the fastest speed with negligible accuracy loss. Experimental results show that it delivers up to 2.01× faster end-to-end inference speed compared to dense inference, and up to 5.46× acceleration in FFN layers under autoregressive decoding in ReLU-fied LLMs.
items.abstract_zh:
随着大规模语言模型（LLM）的出现，人们提出了各种优化技术来实现高效的推理。其中，积极利用输出激活稀疏性的方法引起了人们的广泛关注，这些方法利用 ReLU-fied LLM 并跳过整个内存访问以及输出元素的计算（如果预测为稀疏）。实现输出激活稀疏性的快速准确预测对于提高推理效率至关重要。然而，在实践中，诸如激活离群值和冷热神经元之类的现象，在 LLM 推理过程中显着影响稀疏性的利用，要么已经单独解决，要么没有在结构上集成到现有工作中。

在本文中，我们揭示了这两种现象密切相关，并提出了一种名为 oFFN（异常值感知结构化 FFN）的新型 FFN 架构，可以同时有效地利用它们。所提出的方法在行和列维度上重新排列 FFN 权重，以在考虑异常值的情况下高效准确地预测输出稀疏性，并实现热神经元和冷神经元的分离，并通过各自的最优操作来计算它们。即使批量大小动态变化，所提出的方法也可以为每个神经元提供最佳计算路径。与现有的稀疏性预测技术相比，我们的方法实现了最快的速度，并且精度损失可以忽略不计。实验结果表明，与密集推理相比，它的端到端推理速度提高了 2.01 倍，并且在 ReLU-fied LLM 中的自回归解码下，FFN 层的加速速度提高了 5.46 倍。

items.title: An MLIR Lowering Pipeline for Stencils at Wafer-Scale.
items.abstract:
The Cerebras Wafer-Scale Engine (WSE) delivers performance at an unprecedented scale of over 900,000 compute units, all connected via a single-wafer on-chip interconnect. Initially designed for AI, the WSE architecture is also well-suited for High Performance Computing (HPC). However, its distributed asynchronous programming model diverges significantly from the simple sequential or bulk-synchronous programs that one would typically derive for a given mathematical program description. Targeting the WSE requires a bespoke re-implementation when porting existing code. The absence of WSE support in compilers such as MLIR, meant that there was little hope for automating this process.

Stencils are ubiquitous in HPC, and in this paper we explore the hypothesis that domain specific information about stencils can be leveraged by the compiler to automatically target the WSE without requiring application-level code changes. We present a compiler pipeline that transforms stencil-based kernels into highly optimized CSL code for the WSE, bridging the semantic gap between the mathematical representation of the problem and the WSE's asynchronous execution model. Based upon five benchmarks across three HPC programming technologies, running on both the Cerebras WSE2 and WSE3, our approach delivers comparable, if not slightly better, performance than manually optimized code. Furthermore, without requiring any application level code changes, performance on the WSE3 is around 14 times faster than 128 Nvidia A100 GPUs and 20 times faster than 128 nodes of a CPU-based Cray-EX supercomputer when using our approach.
items.abstract_zh:
Cerebras 晶圆级引擎 (WSE) 提供超过 900,000 个计算单元的前所未有的性能，所有计算单元均通过单晶圆片上互连进行连接。 WSE 架构最初是为 AI 设计的，也非常适合高性能计算 (HPC)。然而，其分布式异步编程模型与通常针对给定数学程序描述导出的简单顺序或批量同步程序有很大不同。针对 WSE 需要在移植现有代码时进行定制的重新实现。 MLIR 等编译器缺乏 WSE 支持，这意味着自动化此过程的希望渺茫。

模板在 HPC 中无处不在，在本文中，我们探讨了这样一个假设：编译器可以利用有关模板的领域特定信息来自动定位 WSE，而无需更改应用程序级代码。我们提出了一个编译器管道，可将基于模板的内核转换为 WSE 的高度优化的 CSL 代码，从而弥合问题的数学表示与 WSE 异步执行模型之间的语义差距。基于三种 HPC 编程技术的五个基准，在 Cerebras WSE2 和 WSE3 上运行，我们的方法提供的性能与手动优化的代码相当，甚至稍好一些。此外，使用我们的方法时，无需更改任何应用程序级代码，WSE3 上的性能比 128 个 Nvidia A100 GPU 快约 14 倍，比基于 CPU 的 Cray-EX 超级计算机的 128 个节点快 20 倍。

items.title: Title: An AI Stack: From Scaling AI Workloads to Evaluating LLMs.
items.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have taken the world by storm, enabling new applications, intensifying GPU shortages, and raising concerns about the accuracy of their outputs. In this talk, I will present several projects I have worked on to address these challenges. Specifically, I will focus on Ray, a distributed framework for scaling AI workloads, vLLM and SGLang, two high-throughput inference engines for LLMs, and LMArena, a platform for accurate LLM benchmarking. I will conclude with key lessons learned and outline directions for future research
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 席卷了全世界，催生了新的应用程序，加剧了 GPU 短缺，并引发了人们对其输出准确性的担忧。在本次演讲中，我将介绍我为应对这些挑战而开展的几个项目。具体来说，我将重点关注 Ray（一个用于扩展 AI 工作负载的分布式框架）、vLLM 和 SGLang（两个用于 LLM 的高吞吐量推理引擎）以及 LMArena（一个用于精确 LLM 基准测试的平台）。最后我将总结重要的经验教训并概述未来研究的方向

items.title: Borrowing Dirty Qubits in Quantum Programs.
items.abstract:
Dirty qubits are ancillary qubits that can be borrowed from idle parts of a computation, enabling qubit reuse and reducing the demand for fresh, clean qubits---a resource that is typically scarce in practice. For such reuse to be valid, the initial states of the dirty qubits must not affect the functionality of the quantum circuits in which they are employed. Moreover, their original states, including any entanglement they possess, must be fully restored after use---a requirement commonly known as safe uncomputation .

In this paper, we formally define the semantics of dirty-qubit borrowing as a feature in quantum programming languages, and introduce a notion of safe uncomputation for dirty qubits in quantum programs. We also present an efficient algorithm, along with experimental results, for verifying safe uncomputation of dirty qubits in certain quantum circuits.
items.abstract_zh:
脏量子位是辅助量子位，可以从计算的空闲部分借用，从而实现量子位的重用并减少对新鲜、干净的量子位的需求——这种资源在实践中通常是稀缺的。为了使这种重用有效，脏量子位的初始状态不得影响使用它们的量子电路的功能。而且，它们的原始状态，包括它们所拥有的任何纠缠，在使用后必须完全恢复——这一要求通常被称为安全不可计算。

在本文中，我们正式将脏量子位借用的语义定义为量子编程语言中的一个特征，并引入了量子程序中脏量子位的安全取消计算的概念。我们还提出了一种有效的算法以及实验结果，用于验证某些量子电路中脏量子位的安全取消计算。

items.title: Once4All: Skeleton-Guided SMT Solver Fuzzing with LLM-Synthesized Generators.
items.abstract: Satisfiability Modulo Theory (SMT) solvers are foundational to modern systems and programming languages research, providing the foundation for tasks like symbolic execution and automated verification. Because these solvers sit on the critical path, their correctness is essential, and high-quality test formulas are key to uncovering bugs. However, while prior testing techniques performed well on earlier solver versions, they struggle to keep pace with rapidly evolving features. Recent approaches based on Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise in exploring advanced solver capabilities, but two obstacles remain: nearly half of the generated formulas are syntactically invalid, and iterative interactions with LLMs introduce substantial computational overhead. In this study, we present O nce 4A ll , a novel LLM-assisted fuzzing framework that addresses both issues by shifting from direct formula generation to the synthesis of generators for reusable terms (i.e., logical expressions). Specifically, O nce 4A ll uses LLMs to (1) automatically extract context-free grammars (CFGs) for SMT theories, including solverspecific extensions, from documentation, and (2) synthesize composable Boolean term generators that adhere to these grammars. During fuzzing, O nce 4A ll populates structural skeletons derived from existing formulas with the terms iteratively produced by the LLM-synthesized generators. This design ensures syntactic validity while promoting semantic diversity. Notably, O nce 4A ll requires only one-time LLM interaction investment , dramatically reducing runtime cost. We evaluated Once4All on two leading SMT solvers: Z3 and cvc5. Our experiments show that O nce 4A ll has identified 43 confirmed bugs, 40 of which have already been fixed by developers.
items.abstract_zh: 可满足性模理论 (SMT) 求解器是现代系统和编程语言研究的基础，为符号执行和自动验证等任务提供了基础。由于这些求解器位于关键路径上，因此它们的正确性至关重要，而高质量的测试公式是发现错误的关键。然而，虽然先前的测试技术在早期求解器版本上表现良好，但它们很难跟上快速发展的功能的步伐。最近基于大型语言模型 (LLM) 的方法在探索高级求解器功能方面显示出了希望，但仍然存在两个障碍：近一半生成的公式在语法上无效，并且与 LLM 的迭代交互引入了大量的计算开销。在这项研究中，我们提出了 Once 4A ll，一种新颖的 LLM 辅助模糊测试框架，该框架通过从直接公式生成转变为可重用术语（即逻辑表达式）的生成器合成来解决这两个问题。具体来说，Once 4A ll 使用 LLM 来 (1) 自动从文档中提取 SMT 理论的上下文无关语法 (CFG)，包括特定于求解器的扩展，以及 (2) 合成遵循这些语法的可组合布尔项生成器。在模糊测试过程中，Once 4A ll 使用由 LLM 合成的生成器迭代生成的术语来填充从现有公式导出的结构骨架。这种设计确保了句法有效性，同时促进了语义多样性。值得注意的是，Once 4A ll只需要一次性LLM交互投资，大大降低了运行成本。我们在两个领先的 SMT 求解器 Z3 和 cvc5 上评估了 Once4All。我们的实验表明，O nce 4A ll 已识别出 43 个已确认的错误，其中 40 个已被开发人员修复。

items.title: MoE-APEX: An Efficient MoE Inference System with Adaptive Precision Expert Offloading.
items.abstract: Mixture-of-experts (MoE) architectures enable scalable Large Language Models (LLMs) with reduced computational overhead, yet their deployment on memory-constrained edge devices is hindered by substantial memory demands. Traditional expert-offloading techniques mitigate memory constraints but often significantly increase inference latency. We introduce MoE-APEX, an Adaptive Precision EXpert offloading system that optimizes MoE inference for edge architectures by dynamically managing expert precision. Our core innovation is to replace less critical cache-miss experts with low-precision variants, reducing loading latency while maintaining accuracy. MoE-APEX introduces three innovative techniques that map the natural hierarchy of MoE computation: (1) a token-level dynamic expert loading mechanism, (2) a layer-level adaptive expert prefetching technique, and (3) a sequence-level cost-aware expert caching policy. These innovations enable MoE-APEX to leverage the benefits of mixed-precision expert inference fully. Implemented atop Llama.cpp, MoE-APEX achieves decoding speedups ranging from 1.34x to 9.75x compared to state-of-the-art MoE offloading systems across diverse edge devices, offering a robust solution for efficient MoE deployment in resource-constrained environments.
items.abstract_zh: 专家混合 (MoE) 架构支持可扩展的大型语言模型 (LLM)，同时减少了计算开销，但它们在内存受限的边缘设备上的部署却受到大量内存需求的阻碍。传统的专家卸载技术可以减轻内存限制，但通常会显着增加推理延迟。我们推出 MoE-APEX，这是一种自适应精度 EXpert 卸载系统，可通过动态管理专家精度来优化边缘架构的 MoE 推理。我们的核心创新是用低精度变体取代不太关键的缓存未命中专家，在保持准确性的同时减少加载延迟。 MoE-APEX 引入了三种创新技术来映射 MoE 计算的自然层次结构：(1) 令牌级动态专家加载机制，(2) 层级自适应专家预取技术，以及 (3) 序列级成本感知专家缓存策略。这些创新使 MoE-APEX 能够充分利用混合精度专家推理的优势。 MoE-APEX 在 Llama.cpp 之上实施，与跨不同边缘设备的最先进的 MoE 卸载系统相比，解码速度提高了 1.34 倍到 9.75 倍，为资源受限环境中的高效 MoE 部署提供了强大的解决方案。

items.title: RedFuser: An Automatic Operator Fusion Framework for Cascaded Reductions on AI Accelerators.
items.abstract: Operator fusion, as a key performance optimization technique in the deployment of AI models, significantly improves execution efficiency and has been widely adopted in modern AI compilers. However, for cascaded reduction operations involving multiple loops with inter-loop data dependencies, such as the safe softmax followed by GEMM within attention mechanisms, existing compilers lack effective automated fusion and kernel generation capabilities. Although some works have addressed specific instances through hand-crafted fusion strategies, their solutions are limited in generality and difficult to extend to other similar structures. Given the prevalence of such computational patterns in deep learning models, there remains significant untapped potential in achieving general and automated fusion optimization. In this paper, we present a formal theoretical methodology for analyzing cascaded reductions which can fuse them into a single loop and introduce an incremental computation form. Based on this methodology, we design Red uction Fuser (RedFuser), a framework that automatically identifies supported cascaded reduction patterns and generates optimized fused kernels. Experiments show that RedFuser successfully fuses diverse workloads, achieving up to 2× to 5× speedup over state-of-the-art AI compilers and matching the performance of highly optimized hand-written kernels.
items.abstract_zh: 算子融合作为人工智能模型部署中的关键性能优化技术，显着提高了执行效率，在现代人工智能编译器中得到了广泛采用。然而，对于涉及具有循环间数据依赖性的多个循环的级联归约操作，例如注意力机制中的安全softmax后跟GEMM，现有编译器缺乏有效的自动融合和内核生成功能。尽管一些作品通过手工制作的融合策略解决了特定的情况，但它们的解决方案在通用性上受到限制，并且难以扩展到其他类似的结构。鉴于此类计算模式在深度学习模型中的普遍存在，在实现通用和自动化融合优化方面仍然存在巨大的未开发潜力。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于分析级联归约的正式理论方法，该方法可以将它们融合到单个循环中并引入增量计算形式。基于这种方法，我们设计了Reduction Fuser（RedFuser），这是一个可以自动识别支持的级联缩减模式并生成优化的融合内核的框架。实验表明，RedFuser 成功融合了不同的工作负载，与最先进的 AI 编译器相比，速度提高了 2 倍到 5 倍，并与高度优化的手写内核的性能相匹配。

items.title: TPLA: Tensor Parallel Latent Attention for Efficient Disaggregated Prefill & Decode Inference.
items.abstract: Multi-Head Latent Attention (MLA), introduced in DeepSeek-V2, compresses key–value states into a low-rank latent vector c KV , caching only this vector to reduce memory. In tensor parallelism (TP), however, attention heads are computed across multiple devices, and each device must load the full c KV , eroding the advantage of MLA over Grouped Query Attention (GQA). We present TPLA, a scheme that partitions both the latent representation and each head's input dimension across devices, performs attention independently on each shard, and aggregates the results with an all-reduce. Unlike GLA, every attention head in TPLA still attends to the full latent space, preserving MLA's representational capacity while reducing the per-device KV cache. To make TPLA drop-in compatible with MLA checkpoints, we further derive orthogonal reparameterizations of RMSNorm and softmax---instantiated with Hadamard and PCA transforms---that mitigate cross-shard discrepancies when slicing latent vectors across devices. Finally, we introduce a prefill-decode separation scheme that keeps the MLA form during compute-bound prefilling and switches to TPLA during memory-bound decoding, minimizing conversion-induced error. By reducing the per-device KV cache for DeepSeek-V3 and Kimi-K2, we achieve 1.79 x) and 1.93 ) speedups respectively, at a 32K-token context length while maintaining accuracy on commonsense and LongBench benchmarks. TPLA can be further implemented on top of FlashAttention-3, enabling practical end-to-end acceleration.
items.abstract_zh: DeepSeek-V2 中引入的多头潜在注意力 (MLA) 将键值状态压缩为低秩潜在向量 c KV ，仅缓存该向量以减少内存。然而，在张量并行（TP）中，注意力头是跨多个设备计算的，并且每个设备必须加载完整的 c KV ，从而削弱了 MLA 相对于分组查询注意力（GQA）的优势。我们提出了 TPLA，这是一种跨设备划分潜在表示和每个头的输入维度的方案，在每个分片上独立执行注意力，并通过全归约聚合结果。与 GLA 不同，TPLA 中的每个注意力头仍然关注完整的潜在空间，保留 MLA 的表示能力，同时减少每个设备的 KV 缓存。为了使 TPLA 插入与 MLA 检查点兼容，我们进一步推导了 RMSNorm 和 softmax 的正交重新参数化（用 Hadamard 和 PCA 变换实例化），以减轻跨设备切片潜在向量时的跨分片差异。最后，我们引入了一种预填充-解码分离方案，该方案在计算限制预填充期间保持 MLA 形式，并在内存限制解码期间切换到 TPLA，从而最大限度地减少转换引起的错误。通过减少 DeepSeek-V3 和 Kimi-K2 的每设备 KV 缓存，我们在 32K 令牌上下文长度下分别实现了 1.79 x) 和 1.93 ) 的加速，同时保持了常识和 LongBench 基准的准确性。 TPLA 可以在 FlashAttention-3 之上进一步实现，实现实用的端到端加速。

items.title: PropHunt: Automated Optimization of Quantum Syndrome Measurement Circuits.
items.abstract:
Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computing (FTQC) relies on Quantum Error Correction (QEC) codes to reach error rates necessary for large scale quantum applications. At a physical level, QEC codes perform parity checks on data qubits, producing syndrome information, through Syndrome Measurement (SM) circuits. These circuits define a code's logical error rate and must be run repeatedly throughout the entire program. The performance of SM circuits is therefore critical to the success of a FTQC system.

While ultimately implemented as physical circuits, SM circuits have challenges that are not addressed by existing circuit optimization tools. Importantly, inside SM circuits themselves errors are expected to occur, and how errors propagate through SM circuits directly impacts which errors are detectable and correctable, defining the code's logical error rate. This is not modeled in NISQ-era tools, which instead optimize for targets such as gate depth or gate count to mitigate the chance that any error occurs. This gap leaves key questions unanswered about the expected real-world effectiveness of QEC codes.

In this work we address this gap and present PropHunt, an automated tool for optimizing SM circuits for CSS codes. We evaluate PropHunt on a suite of relevant QEC codes and demonstrate PropHunt's ability to iteratively improve performance and recover existing hand-designed circuits automatically. We also propose a near-term QEC application, Hook-ZNE, which leverages PropHunt's fine-grained control over logical error rate to improve Zero-Noise Extrapolation (ZNE), a promising error mitigation strategy.
items.abstract_zh:
容错量子计算 (FTQC) 依靠量子纠错 (QEC) 代码来达到大规模量子应用所需的错误率。在物理层面，QEC 代码对数据量子位执行奇偶校验，通过综合症测量 (SM) 电路产生综合症信息。这些电路定义了代码的逻辑错误率，并且必须在整个程序中重复运行。因此，SM 电路的性能对于 FTQC 系统的成功至关重要。

虽然最终实现为物理电路，但 SM 电路面临着现有电路优化工具无法解决的挑战。重要的是，SM 电路本身内部预计会发生错误，并且错误如何通过 SM 电路传播直接影响哪些错误是可检测和可纠正的，从而定义了代码的逻辑错误率。 NISQ 时代的工具并未对此进行建模，而是针对门深度或门计数等目标进行优化，以减少发生任何错误的可能性。这一差距使得有关 QEC 代码在现实世界中的预期有效性的关键问题没有得到解答。

在这项工作中，我们解决了这一差距并提出了 PropHunt，这是一种用于优化 CSS 代码的 SM 电路的自动化工具。我们在一套相关的 QEC 代码上评估 PropHunt，并证明 PropHunt 能够迭代地提高性能并自动恢复现有的手工设计电路。我们还提出了一个近期的 QEC 应用程序 Hook-ZNE，它利用 PropHunt 对逻辑错误率的细粒度控制来改进零噪声外推法 (ZNE)，这是一种很有前景的错误缓解策略。

items.title: Efficient Temporal Graph Network Training via Unified Redundancy Elimination.
items.abstract: Temporal Graph Network (TGN) is increasingly adopted to model evolving relationships in dynamic graphs. However, the training pipeline is plagued by pervasive redundancy in computation, storage, and data loading. These redundancies harm computational efficiency, exacerbate memory pressure, and induce excessive CPU-GPU data transfers. We present PULSE, an end-to-end TGN training framework that systematically eliminates redundancies guided by a unified minimal-unit principle. To realize such principle, PULSE defines three synergetic units: 1) the Minimal Input Unit (MIU) for component-wise deduplication and operator-level reconstruction of redundant computations, 2) the Minimal Storage Unit (MSU) for dependency-guided message reconstruction, only preserving irreproducible entries while enabling on-demand recovery of others, and 3) the Minimal Reuse Unit (MRU) for GPU memory management, combining a BlockPool-based buffer allocator with a bipartite temporal reuse strategy to mitigate fragmentation and exploit inter-batch locality. Experimental results on representative benchmarks demonstrate that PULSE improves training throughput by up to 6.67× over the state-of-the-art baselines.
items.abstract_zh: 时态图网络（TGN）越来越多地用于模拟动态图中不断变化的关系。然而，训练管道受到计算、存储和数据加载中普遍冗余的困扰。这些冗余会损害计算效率，加剧内存压力，并导致过多的 CPU-GPU 数据传输。我们提出了 PULSE，一个端到端的 TGN 训练框架，它在统一的最小单元原则的指导下系统地消除了冗余。为了实现这一原则，PULSE 定义了三个协同单元：1）用于组件级重复数据删除和冗余计算的操作级重建的最小输入单元（MIU），2）用于依赖引导消息重建的最小存储单元（MSU），仅保留不可重复的条目，同时启用其他条目的按需恢复，以及 3）用于 GPU 内存管理的最小重用单元（MRU），将基于 BlockPool 的缓冲区分配器与双向时间重用相结合减少碎片和利用批次间局部性的策略。代表性基准的实验结果表明，与最先进的基准相比，PULSE 将训练吞吐量提高了 6.67 倍。

items.title: It Takes Two to Entangle.
items.abstract: Distributed machine learning training and inference is common today because today's large models require more memory and compute than can be provided by a single GPU. Distributed models are generally produced by programmers who take a sequential model specification and apply several distribution strategies to distribute state and computation across GPUs. Unfortunately, bugs can be introduced in the process, and a distributed model implementation's outputs might differ from the sequential model's outputs. In this paper, we describe an approach to statically identify such bugs by checking model refinement, that is, can the sequential model's outputs be reconstructed from the distributed model's outputs? Our approach, implemented in Entangle, uses iterative rewriting to prove model refinement. Our approach can scale to today's large models and deployments: we evaluate it using GPT and Llama-3. Further, it provides actionable outputs that aids in bug localization.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式机器学习训练和推理如今很常见，因为当今的大型模型需要比单个 GPU 所能提供的更多的内存和计算量。分布式模型通常由程序员生成，他们采用顺序模型规范并应用多种分布策略来跨 GPU 分布状态和计算。不幸的是，这个过程中可能会引入错误，并且分布式模型实现的输出可能与顺序模型的输出不同。在本文中，我们描述了一种通过检查模型细化来静态识别此类错误的方法，即顺序模型的输出是否可以从分布式模型的输出中重建？我们的方法在 Entangle 中实现，使用迭代重写来证明模型的细化。我们的方法可以扩展到当今的大型模型和部署：我们使用 GPT 和 Llama-3 对其进行评估。此外，它还提供可操作的输出，有助于错误定位。

items.title: SpecProto: A Parallelizing Compiler for Speculative Decoding of Large Protocol Buffers Data.
items.abstract:
Protobuf is a widely used data serialization format, especially in cloud environments. However, existing compilers generate only serial decoders, limiting scalability for large datasets. While parallel parsing has been studied for textual formats (e.g., XML), parallel decoding of binary formats like Protobuf remains unexplored, which present unique opportunities.

We propose two techniques to enable parallel Protobuf decoding. First, we leverage the length-prefixed encoding of Protobuf to ''skim'' the binary and identify decoding tasks. To address inefficiencies caused by many small or imbalanced fields, we further introduce speculative parallelization, which partitions a binary into even segments and predicts decoding states across boundaries. We implement these techniques in SpecProto, a parallelizing compiler that generates parallel decoders for a given Protobuf schema. Experiments on real-world and synthetic datasets show that SpecProto achieves significant speedups by leveraging multiple CPU cores.
items.abstract_zh:
Protobuf 是一种广泛使用的数据序列化格式，尤其是在云环境中。然而，现有的编译器仅生成串行解码器，限制了大型数据集的可扩展性。虽然已经针对文本格式（例如 XML）研究了并行解析，但像 Protobuf 这样的二进制格式的并行解码仍未得到探索，这提供了独特的机会。

我们提出了两种技术来实现并行 Protobuf 解码。首先，我们利用 Protobuf 的长度前缀编码来“浏览”二进制文件并识别解码任务。为了解决由许多小或不平衡字段引起的低效率问题，我们进一步引入了推测并行化，它将二进制文件划分为偶数段并预测跨边界的解码状态。我们在 SpecProto 中实现这些技术，SpecProto 是一个并行编译器，可为给定的 Protobuf 模式生成并行解码器。对真实世界和合成数据集的实验表明，SpecProto 通过利用多个 CPU 内核实现了显着的加速。

items.title: Maverick: Rethinking TFHE Bootstrapping on GPUs via Algorithm-Hardware Co-Design.
items.abstract:
Fully homomorphic encryption (FHE) enables arbitrary computation over encrypted data (ciphertext) without compromising confidentiality. Within this family, TFHE features versatile bootstrapping mechanisms that is attractive for security-critical applications. However, its prohibitive computational cost severely limits practical deployment. While hardware acceleration is promising, mere compute scaling fails to overcome the inherent barriers. In particular, the combination of limited algorithmic parallelism and inadequate understanding of hardware behaviors prevents full exploitation of the available performance headroom.

In this paper, we present Maverick, a GPU-based solution that rethinks TFHE bootstrapping acceleration through joint algorithm–hardware co-design. At the algorithmic level, we reconstruct blind rotation by shifting test vectors from pre-loading to post-injection. This reformulation turns the original length- n single chain into a multi-chain structure with √ n sub-chains of depth √ n , raising external-product (EP) parallelism from 1 to the theoretical bound of √ n . At the hardware level, we introduce a partial-domain transformation strategy that terminates the NTT early in a stage-aware manner and selectively shifts computation to downstream operators, redefining operator boundaries to balance the workload across EP operators. Experimental results show that Maverick delivers state-of-the-art GPU acceleration. It outperforms the best existing CPU and GPU baselines by 331.2× and 3.4×, respectively, on programmable bootstrapping, and achieves up to 108.5× speedup over CPU-based circuit bootstrapping. Together, these results highlight the substantial potential of algorithm–hardware co-design for advancing FHE performance on general-purpose platforms.
items.abstract_zh:
完全同态加密 (FHE) 可以在不影响机密性的情况下对加密数据（密文）进行任意计算。在该系列中，TFHE 具有多功能引导机制，对于安全关键应用程序很有吸引力。然而，其高昂的计算成本严重限制了实际部署。虽然硬件加速前景广阔，但单纯的计算扩展无法克服固有的障碍。特别是，有限的算法并行性和对硬件行为的不充分理解相结合，阻碍了可用性能空间的充分利用。

在本文中，我们提出了 Maverick，一种基于 GPU 的解决方案，通过联合算法-硬件协同设计重新思考 TFHE 自举加速。在算法层面，我们通过将测试向量从预加载转移到注入后来重建盲旋转。这种重新表述将原始长度为 n 的单链变成了具有 √ n 个深度为 √ n 的子链的多链结构，将外积（EP）并行度从 1 提高到了 √ n 的理论界限。在硬件层面，我们引入了部分域转换策略，该策略以阶段感知的方式提前终止 NTT，并有选择地将计算转移到下游算子，重新定义算子边界以平衡 EP 算子之间的工作负载。实验结果表明 Maverick 提供最先进的 GPU 加速。在可编程引导方面，它的性能分别比现有最佳 CPU 和 GPU 基线高出 331.2 倍和 3.4 倍，并且比基于 CPU 的电路引导实现高达 108.5 倍的加速。总之，这些结果凸显了算法-硬件协同设计在提高通用平台上的 FHE 性能方面的巨大潜力。

items.title: T-Control: An Efficient Dynamic Tensor Rematerialization System for DNN Training.
items.abstract: With the continuous growth of model and batch sizes, DNN model training increasingly suffers from excessive memory consumption. Tensor rematerialization has emerged as an effective technique to enable training under limited memory constraints. However, dynamic rematerialization methods often underperform static approaches, primarily due to their greedy tensor eviction schedules and runtime overhead. In this work, we develop T-Control, a dynamic tensor rematerialization system for DNN model training. T-Control integrates the topology of the traced tensor dependency graph with real-time memory usage to make informed, adaptive tensor retention decisions, preserving critical tensors and reducing eviction-induced recomputation. Furthermore, by extending PyTorch's native memory manager with our fine-grained memory management strategy, T-control effectively improves memory utilization, thereby reducing unnecessary tensor eviction. Experimental results demonstrate that T-Control boosts throughput by up to 1.58× and 1.91× over state-of-the-art static and dynamic tensor rematerialization systems.
items.abstract_zh: 随着模型和批量大小的不断增长，DNN 模型训练越来越受到内存消耗过多的困扰。张量再物化已成为一种有效的技术，可以在有限的内存限制下进行训练。然而，动态重物化方法通常表现不佳，这主要是由于其贪婪的张量驱逐计划和运行时开销。在这项工作中，我们开发了 T-Control，一种用于 DNN 模型训练的动态张量再物化系统。 T-Control 将跟踪张量依赖图的拓扑与实时内存使用相集成，以做出明智的自适应张量保留决策，保留关键张量并减少驱逐引起的重新计算。此外，通过使用我们的细粒度内存管理策略扩展 PyTorch 的本机内存管理器，T-control 有效地提高了内存利用率，从而减少了不必要的张量驱逐。实验结果表明，与最先进的静态和动态张量再物化系统相比，T-Control 的吞吐量分别提高了 1.58 倍和 1.91 倍。

items.title: PrioriFI: More Informed Fault Injection for Edge Neural Networks.
items.abstract: As neural networks (NNs) are increasingly used to provide edge intelligence, there is a growing need to make the edge devices that run them robust to faults. Edge devices must mitigate the resulting hardware failures while maintaining strict constraints on power, energy, latency, throughput, memory size, and computational resources. Edge NNs require fundamental changes in model architecture, e.g., quantization and fewer, smaller layers. PrioriFI is a more informed fault injection (FI) algorithm that evaluates edge NN robustness by ranking NN bits based on their fault sensitivity. PrioriFI prioritizes finding highly fault-sensitive bits, that is, the bits most critical to an NN's correctness, first. To accomplish this, PrioriFI uses the Hessian for the initial parameter ranking. Then, during an FI campaign, PrioriFI uses the information gained from past FIs as a heuristic so that future FIs target the bits likely to be the next most sensitive. With PrioriFI, designers can quickly evaluate different NNs and better co-design fault-tolerant edge NN systems.
items.abstract_zh: 随着神经网络 (NN) 越来越多地用于提供边缘智能，越来越需要使运行神经网络的边缘设备能够抵御故障。边缘设备必须减轻由此产生的硬件故障，同时保持对功率、能源、延迟、吞吐量、内存大小和计算资源的严格限制。边缘神经网络需要对模型架构进行根本性的改变，例如量化和更少、更小的层。 PrioriFI 是一种更明智的故障注入 (FI) 算法，它通过根据故障敏感性对 NN 位进行排名来评估边缘 NN 的鲁棒性。 PrioriFI 优先考虑寻找高度故障敏感位，即首先对神经网络的正确性最关键的位。为了实现这一点，PrioriFI 使用 Hessian 矩阵进行初始参数排序。然后，在 FI 活动期间，PrioriFI 使用从过去 FI 获得的信息作为启发式方法，以便未来的 FI 瞄准可能是下一个最敏感的位。借助 PrioriFI，设计人员可以快速评估不同的神经网络，并更好地协同设计容错边缘神经网络系统。

items.title: RowArmor: Efficient and Comprehensive Protection Against DRAM Disturbance Attacks.
items.abstract:
Shrinking process technologies have made DRAM increasingly vulnerable to disturbance attacks, such as RowHammer, which can compromise data integrity or induce a Denial-of-Service (DoS) state. Existing solutions focus on preventing errors through activation monitoring and extra refreshes, but they often incur substantial performance overhead and can unintentionally exacerbate DoS risks.

This paper introduces RowArmor, a novel defense mechanism that addresses both data corruption and DoS attacks. RowArmor adopts a reactive approach, correcting disturbance errors as they occur via address scrambling and enhanced error correcting codes. This strategy avoids the high costs of preventive methods while addressing diverse attack patterns, including RowPress. Our evaluation demonstrates that RowArmor effectively defends against data corruption and DoS attacks with a negligible performance overhead of up to 0.7%.
items.abstract_zh:
缩小工艺技术使 DRAM 越来越容易受到干扰攻击，例如 RowHammer，它可能会损害数据完整性或引发拒绝服务 (DoS) 状态。现有的解决方案侧重于通过激活监控和额外刷新来防止错误，但它们通常会产生大量的性能开销，并且可能会无意中加剧 DoS 风险。

本文介绍了 RowArmor，这是一种解决数据损坏和 DoS 攻击的新型防御机制。 RowArmor 采用反应式方法，通过地址加扰和增强型纠错码纠正发生的干扰错误。该策略避免了预防方法的高成本，同时解决了包括 RowPress 在内的各种攻击模式。我们的评估表明，RowArmor 可以有效防御数据损坏和 DoS 攻击，性能开销可忽略不计，最高可达 0.7%。

items.title: Insum: Sparse GPU Kernels Simplified and Optimized with Indirect Einsums.
items.abstract: Programming high-performance sparse GPU kernels is notoriously difficult, requiring both substantial effort and deep expertise. Sparse compilers aim to simplify this process, but existing systems fall short in two key ways. First, they are primarily designed for CPUs and rarely produce high-performance GPU code. Second, when computations involve both sparse and dense regions, these compilers often fail to optimize the dense portions effectively. In this paper, we propose a new approach for expressing sparse computations. We start from format-agnostic Einsums over sparse tensors and rewrite them into format-conscious indirect Einsums, which explicitly encode format information by mapping sparse data and metadata onto dense tensor operations through indirect indexing. To execute indirect Einsums, we introduce the Insum compiler, which generates efficient GPU code for these Einsums by lowering to the PyTorch compiler, extended to better support Tensor Core–enabled indirect Einsums. We also present two fixed-length sparse formats, GroupCOO and BlockGroupCOO, designed to fit naturally with indirect Einsums. Our approach achieves 1.14×–3.81× speedups across a range of sparse GPU applications while reducing lines of code by 202×–4491× compared to hand-written implementations. The source code for Insum is publicly available at https://github.com/nullplay/IndirectEinsum.
items.abstract_zh: 众所周知，对高性能稀疏 GPU 内核进行编程非常困难，需要大量的努力和深厚的专业知识。稀疏编译器旨在简化此过程，但现有系统在两个关键方面存在不足。首先，它们主要是为 CPU 设计的，很少生成高性能 GPU 代码。其次，当计算同时涉及稀疏区域和密集区域时，这些编译器通常无法有效优化密集部分。在本文中，我们提出了一种表达稀疏计算的新方法。我们从稀疏张量上与格式无关的 Einsum 开始，并将它们重写为格式意识的间接 Einsum，它通过间接索引将稀疏数据和元数据映射到密集张量操作来显式编码格式信息。为了执行间接 Einsum，我们引入了 Insum 编译器，它通过降低到 PyTorch 编译器为这些 Einsum 生成高效的 GPU 代码，并进行扩展以更好地支持支持 Tensor Core 的间接 Einsum。我们还提出了两种固定长度的稀疏格式：GroupCOO 和 BlockGroupCOO，旨在自然地适应间接 Einsum。与手写实现相比，我们的方法在一系列稀疏 GPU 应用程序中实现了 1.14×–3.81× 的加速，同时减少了 202×–4491× 的代码行。 Insum 的源代码可在 https://github.com/nullplay/IndirectEinsum 上公开获取。

items.title: APT: Securing Against DRAM Read Disturbance via Adaptive Probabilistic In-DRAM Trackers.
items.abstract:
With exacerbated DRAM read disturbance, transparent in-DRAM defenses require space (to track the aggressor rows) and time (to perform more mitigations). To reduce storage overhead, recent works have developed probabilistic row-sampling techniques with several entries. To address the time issue, these techniques employ Refresh Management (RFM) commands introduced in DDR5. However, probabilistic defenses with RFM face two critical challenges: (i) fixed-probability sampling under dynamic activation patterns can cause row-sampling misses, allowing attacks to evade mitigation, and (ii) RFM causes timing variations that can be exploited for side and covert channels to leak sensitive information. The goal of this paper is to design a low-cost and secure in-DRAM defense that overcomes these challenges.

Our solution, APT (Adaptive Probabilistic In-DRAM Tracker), builds on two key insights. First, by ensuring that mitigation probabilities across activations always sum to 1, row-sampling misses can be prevented and the likelihood of capturing attacked rows can be improved. Second, as RFM is insecure, mitigation should exploit the unutilized slack within the refresh cycle (tRFC) while minimizing per-mitigation latency. APT adaptively allots equal sampling chances to all activations, based on real-time activation counts, avoiding sampling misses. To increase the mitigation rate without relying on RFM, we develop customizable Step Mitigation, which securely protects against transitive attacks with only two victim refreshes. Step Mitigation enables APT to perform up to three mitigations (APT-3) per periodic refresh (REF). We analytically derive the minimum RowHammer threshold tolerated by APT across all patterns. APT achieves a worst-case threshold of 694, which can be reduced to 228 using secure Timing-Based RFM (TB-RFM) at negligible overhead. We also show that APT compares favorably to TPRAC.
items.abstract_zh:
随着 DRAM 读取干扰的加剧，透明的 DRAM 内防御需要空间（以跟踪攻击者行）和时间（以执行更多缓解措施）。为了减少存储开销，最近的工作开发了具有多个条目的概率行采样技术。为了解决时间问题，这些技术采用了 DDR5 中引入的刷新管理 (RFM) 命令。然而，RFM 的概率防御面临两个关键挑战：(i) 动态激活模式下的固定概率采样可能会导致行采样缺失，从而使攻击能够逃避缓解措施；(ii) RFM 会导致时序变化，这些时序变化可被用于侧面和隐蔽通道，从而泄露敏感信息。本文的目标是设计一种低成本且安全的 DRAM 内防御来克服这些挑战。

我们的解决方案 APT（自适应概率 In-DRAM 跟踪器）基于两个关键见解。首先，通过确保跨激活的缓解概率始终为 1，可以防止行采样缺失，并提高捕获受攻击行的可能性。其次，由于 RFM 不安全，缓解措施应利用刷新周期 (tRFC) 内未利用的余量，同时最大限度地减少每次缓解的延迟。 APT 根据实时激活计数，自适应地为所有激活分配相等的采样机会，避免采样丢失。为了在不依赖 RFM 的情况下提高缓解率，我们开发了可定制的步骤缓解，只需两次受害者刷新即可安全地防止传递攻击。逐步缓解使 APT 在每次定期刷新 (REF) 时最多执行三次缓解 (APT-3)。我们分析得出 APT 在所有模式中容忍的最小 RowHammer 阈值。 APT 的最坏情况阈值为 694，使用安全的基于定时的 RFM (TB-RFM) 可将其降低至 228，而开销可以忽略不计。我们还表明 APT 优于 TPRAC。

items.title: Triton-Sanitizer: A Fast and Device-Agnostic Memory Sanitizer for Triton with Rich Diagnostic Context.
items.abstract: Memory access errors remain one of the most pervasive bugs in GPU programming. Existing GPU sanitizers such as compute-sanitizer detect memory access errors by instrumenting every memory instruction in low-level IRs or binaries, which imposes high overhead and provides minimal memory access error diagnostic context for fixing problems. We present Triton-Sanitizer, the first device-agnostic memory sanitizer designed for Triton, a domain-specific language for developing portable, efficient GPU kernels for deep learning workloads. Triton-Sanitizer leverages Triton's tile-oriented semantics to construct symbolic expressions for memory addresses and masks, verifies them with an SMT solver, and selectively falls back to eager simulation for indirect accesses. This hybrid analysis enables precise detection of memory access errors without false positives while avoiding the cost of per-access instrumentation. Beyond detection, Triton-Sanitizer generates rich diagnostic reports that attribute violations to the tensors nearest to the violated addresses, track the complete call path, and expose the symbolic operations responsible for incorrect addresses. Evaluated on seven widely used open-source repositories of Triton kernels, Triton-Sanitizer uncovered 24 previously unknown memory access errors, of which 8 have already been fixed and upstreamed by us. Compared to compute-sanitizer, Triton-Sanitizer achieves speedups ranging from 1.07× to 14.66×, with an average improvement of 1.62×, demonstrating its ability to enhance performance, precision, and usability in memory access error detection.
items.abstract_zh: 内存访问错误仍然是 GPU 编程中最普遍的错误之一。现有的 GPU 清理程序（例如计算清理程序）通过检测低级 IR 或二进制文件中的每条内存指令来检测内存访问错误，这会带来很高的开销，并为修复问题提供最小的内存访问错误诊断上下文。我们推出了 Triton-Sanitizer，这是第一个为 Triton 设计的与设备无关的内存清理程序，Triton 是一种特定于领域的语言，用于为深度学习工作负载开发可移植、高效的 GPU 内核。 Triton-Sanitizer 利用 Triton 的面向图块的语义来构建内存地址和掩码的符号表达式，使用 SMT 求解器验证它们，并有选择地回退到急切模拟以进行间接访问。这种混合分析能够精确检测内存访问错误，不会出现误报，同时避免每次访问检测的成本。除了检测之外，Triton-Sanitizer 还会生成丰富的诊断报告，将违规归因于最接近违规地址的张量，跟踪完整的调用路径，并公开导致错误地址的符号操作。通过对七个广泛使用的 Triton 内核开源存储库进行评估，Triton-Sanitizer 发现了 24 个以前未知的内存访问错误，其中 8 个已被我们修复并上传到上游。与compute-sanitizer相比，Triton-Sanitizer实现了从1.07×到14.66×的加速，平均提高了1.62×，证明了其在内存访问错误检测方面增强性能、精度和可用性的能力。

items.title: Segment Only Where You Look: Leveraging Human Gaze Behavior for Efficient Computer Vision Applications in Augmented Reality.
items.abstract:
Augmented reality (AR) comprises groundbreaking technologies that are reshaping the landscape of human interaction. Image segmentation, which divides a user front-scene frame into more manageable parts for analysis, is of paramount importance since this technique enables AR systems to extract digital information precisely from the real world by identifying and isolating specific objects in the user's surroundings. Despite its importance, the segmentation task imposes substantial computational demands and processing delays on AR devices, significantly degrading the user experience.

In this work, we aim to reduce the high computational costs of the segmentation task in AR by leveraging natural human eye dynamics and focusing on segmenting only where you look (SOLO). This involves co-optimizing image segmentation algorithms with underlying hardware for greater efficiency. We introduce SOLO algorithm, an efficient deep learning framework that takes high-resolution input images and user eye images to effectively segment only the instance of interest. Integrated with the saliency-based sensing (SBS) and SOLO accelerator as a plug-in for SoCs of the AR device, SOLO significantly lowers the computational costs for image segmentation, achieving up to a 12× reduction in end-to-end latency compared to other baselines.
items.abstract_zh:
增强现实 (AR) 包含正在重塑人类交互格局的突破性技术。图像分割将用户的前场景画面分割成更易于管理的部分进行分析，这一技术至关重要，因为该技术使 AR 系统能够通过识别和隔离用户周围的特定对象来从现实世界中精确提取数字信息。尽管分割任务很重要，但它会给 AR 设备带来大量的计算需求和处理延迟，从而显着降低用户体验。

在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过利用自然人眼动态并专注于仅对您所看的地方进行分割（SOLO），从而降低 AR 中分割任务的高计算成本。这涉及到图像分割算法与底层硬件的共同优化，以提高效率。我们引入了 SOLO 算法，这是一种高效的深度学习框架，它采用高分辨率输入图像和用户眼睛图像来有效地仅分割感兴趣的实例。 SOLO 与基于显着性的传感 (SBS) 和 SOLO 加速器集成，作为 AR 设备 SoC 的插件，显着降低了图像分割的计算成本，与其他基准相比，端到端延迟降低了 12 倍。

items.title: Finding Reusable Instructions via E-Graph Anti-Unification.
items.abstract:
Domain-specific accelerators provide an increasingly valuable source of performance for diverse applications. Custom instructions that trigger the execution of dedicated hardware units or accelerators for common application functions become key building blocks in modern computing systems, balancing performance and cost effectiveness. RISC-V, the open and extensible instruction set architecture, is increasingly popularizing this trend. However, exploring custom instructions for an application domain remains challenging. Existing automated approaches suffer from poor reusability and limited performance. They can only identify or merge syntactically similar, scalar instruction sequences while missing semantically equivalent patterns.

We present ISAMORE, an end-to-end framework for discovering reusable custom instructions from domain applications. ISAMORE encodes general applications in an e-graph by constructing a structured domain-specific language. Its core methodology, reusable instruction identification ( RII ), leverages e-graph anti-unification (AU) to identify semantically equivalent common patterns across diverse applications, fully unleashing the potential of custom instructions. RII employs a phase-oriented iterative process with smart heuristics to enhance the scalability when dealing with real-world codebases. Besides, RII introduces the novel pattern vectorization technique, packing common operations from scalar programs into lanes of vectorized custom instructions to exploit data-level parallelism. Moreover, RII 's Pareto-optimal pattern selection balances performance gains with area overheads, guided by a profiling-based hardware-aware cost model. Evaluation demonstrates ISAMORE 's substantial performance gains, 1.12x-2.69x, over baseline approaches. We also demonstrate ISAMORE 's practical potentials using various case studies, including library analysis for three application domains and hardware specialization for quantized LLM inference and post-quantum cryptography.
items.abstract_zh:
特定领域的加速器为不同的应用程序提供了越来越有价值的性能来源。触发执行常见应用程序功能的专用硬件单元或加速器的自定义指令成为现代计算系统中的关键构建块，平衡性能和成本效益。 RISC-V这种开放且可扩展的指令集架构正在日益普及这一趋势。然而，探索应用程序域的自定义指令仍然具有挑战性。现有的自动化方法存在可重用性差和性能有限的问题。它们只能识别或合并语法上相似的标量指令序列，而缺少语义上等效的模式。

我们提出了 ISAMORE，一个端到端框架，用于从领域应用程序中发现可重用的自定义指令。 ISAMORE 通过构建结构化的特定领域语言，对电子图中的通用应用程序进行编码。其核心方法论是可重用指令识别（RII），利用电子图反统一（AU）来识别不同应用程序中语义等效的通用模式，充分释放自定义指令的潜力。 RII 采用具有智能启发式的面向阶段的迭代过程，以增强处理实际代码库时的可扩展性。此外，RII 引入了新颖的模式向量化技术，将标量程序中的常见操作打包到向量化自定义指令通道中，以利用数据级并行性。此外，RII 的帕累托最优模式选择在基于分析的硬件感知成本模型的指导下，平衡了性能增益和面积开销。评估表明 ISAMORE 的性能比基准方法显着提高 1.12 倍至 2.69 倍。我们还通过各种案例研究展示了 ISAMORE 的实际潜力，包括三个应用领域的库分析以及量化 LLM 推理和后量子密码学的硬件专业化。

items.title: Fine-grained and Non-intrusive LLM Training Monitoring via Microsecond-level Traffic Measurement.
items.abstract: Large language model (LLM) training is prone to anomalies due to its long duration and large scale, which can lead to significant performance degradation or even training crashes. Due to the synchronization nature of LLM training, anomalies exhibit the cascading effect, making their diagnosis challenging. Existing approaches rely on collecting communication operator information via code instrumentation, which yields only coarse-grained monitoring data and requires modifications to training code or communication libraries. We propose Pulse, a fine-grained, non-intrusive, and easy-to-deploy monitoring system. Our key idea is to enable fine-grained monitoring via traffic measurement. Pulse conducts microsecond-level RDMA traffic measurement on NICs, and transforms flow-level measurements into communication operator measurements, thereby enabling fine-grained and non-intrusive monitoring. We deploy Pulse on a testbed with 64 H200 GPUs and evaluate its anomaly localization capability under common failure scenarios. Pulse achieves machine-level localization in 10 out of 12 scenarios, while existing methods succeed in only 4 and even misdiagnose 2 of the remaining scenarios. Additionally, Pulse achieves over 90% precision and 100% recall, supports up to 2000 concurrent RDMA flow measurements per NIC, and imposes negligible overhead on training performance, making it a practical solution for real-world LLM training environments.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）训练由于持续时间长、规模大，容易出现异常，导致性能显着下降甚至训练崩溃。由于法学硕士培训的同步性质，异常现象表现出级联效应，使其诊断具有挑战性。现有方法依赖于通过代码检测收集通信运营商信息，这仅产生粗粒度的监控数据，并且需要修改训练代码或通信库。我们建议使用 Pulse，这是一种细粒度、非侵入式且易于部署的监控系统。我们的主要想法是通过流量测量来实现细粒度的监控。 Pulse对网卡进行微秒级的RDMA流量测量，并将流量级测量转化为通信运营商测量，从而实现细粒度、非侵入式监控。我们在具有 64 个 H200 GPU 的测试台上部署 Pulse，并评估其在常见故障场景下的异常定位能力。 Pulse 在 12 个场景中的 10 个场景中实现了机器级定位，而现有方法仅在 4 个场景中成功，甚至误诊了其余场景中的 2 个。此外，Pulse 实现了超过 90% 的精度和 100% 的召回率，支持每个 NIC 多达 2000 个并发 RDMA 流量测量，并且对训练性能的开销可以忽略不计，使其成为现实 LLM 训练环境的实用解决方案。

items.title: CREATE: Cross-Layer Resilience Characterization and Optimization for Efficient yet Reliable Embodied AI Systems.
items.abstract:
Embodied Artificial Intelligence (AI) has recently attracted significant attention as it bridges AI with the physical world. Modern embodied AI systems often combine a Large Language Model (LLM)-based planner for high-level task planning and a reinforcement learning (RL)-based controller for low-level action generation, enabling embodied agents to tackle complex tasks in real-world environments. However, deploying embodied agents remains challenging due to their high computation requirements, especially for battery-powered local devices. Although techniques like lowering operating voltage can improve energy efficiency, they can introduce bit errors and result in task failures.

In this work, we propose CREATE, a general design principle that leverages heterogeneous resilience at different layers for synergistic energy-reliability co-optimization. For the first time, we conduct a comprehensive error injection study on modern embodied AI systems and observe an inherent but heterogeneous fault tolerance. Building upon these insights, we develop an anomaly detection and clearance mechanism at the circuit level to eliminate outlier errors. At the model level, we propose a weight-rotation-enhanced planning algorithm to improve the fault tolerance of the LLM-based planner. Furthermore, we introduce an application-level technique, autonomy-adaptive voltage scaling , to dynamically adjust the operating voltage of the controllers. The voltage scaling circuit is co-designed to enable online voltage adjustment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that without compromising task quality, CREATE achieves 40.6% computational energy savings on average over nominal-voltage baselines and 35.0% over prior-art techniques. This further leads to 29.5% to 37.3% chip-level energy savings and approximately a 15% to 30% improvement in battery life.
items.abstract_zh:
具身人工智能（AI）最近引起了广泛关注，因为它将人工智能与物理世界联系起来。现代具体化人工智能系统通常结合用于高级任务规划的基于大型语言模型（LLM）的规划器和用于低级动作生成的基于强化学习（RL）的控制器，使具体化代理能够处理现实环境中的复杂任务。然而，由于其高计算要求，部署实体代理仍然具有挑战性，特别是对于电池供电的本地设备。尽管降低工作电压等技术可以提高能源效率，但它们可能会引入误码并导致任务失败。

在这项工作中，我们提出了 CREATE，这是一种通用设计原则，利用不同层的异构弹性来实现协同能源可靠性协同优化。我们首次对现代人工智能系统进行全面的错误注入研究，并观察到固有但异构的容错能力。基于这些见解，我们开发了电路级别的异常检测和清除机制，以消除异常错误。在模型层面，我们提出了一种权重旋转增强规划算法来提高基于 LLM 的规划器的容错能力。此外，我们引入了一种应用级技术，即自主自适应电压缩放，来动态调整控制器的工作电压。电压缩放电路经过共同设计，可实现在线电压调整。大量实验表明，在不影响任务质量的情况下，CREATE 比标称电压基线平均节省了 40.6% 的计算能源，比现有技术节省了 35.0%。这进一步导致芯片级节能 29.5% 至 37.3%，电池寿命延长约 15% 至 30%。

items.title: Wave: Leveraging Architecture Observation for Privacy-Preserving Model Oversight.
items.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) inference increasingly require mechanisms that provide runtime visibility into what is actually executing, without exposing model weights or code. We present WAVE, a hardware-grounded monitoring framework that leverages GPU performance counters (PMCs) to observe LLM inference. WAVE is built on the insight that legitimate executions of a given model must satisfy hardware-constrained invariants, such as memory accesses, instruction mix, and tensor-core utilization, induced by the model's linear-algebraic structure. WAVE collects lightweight PMC traces and applies a two-stage pipeline: (1) inferring architectural properties (e.g., parameter count, layer depth, hidden dimension, batch size) from the observed traces; and (2) using an SMT-based consistency checker to assess whether the execution aligns with the provisioned compute and the claimed model's constraints. We evaluate WAVE on common open-source LLM architectures, such as LLaMA, GPT, and Qwen, across multiple GPU architectures, including NVIDIA Ada Lovelace, Hopper, and Blackwell. Results show that WAVE recovers key model parameters with an average error of 6.8% and identifies disguised executions under realistic perturbations. By grounding oversight in hardware invariants, WAVE provides a practical avenue for continuous, privacy-preserving runtime monitoring of LLM services.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 推理越来越需要能够在不暴露模型权重或代码的情况下提供实际执行内容的运行时可见性的机制。我们推出了 WAVE，一种基于硬件的监控框架，它利用 GPU 性能计数器 (PMC) 来观察 LLM 推理。 WAVE 建立在这样的认识之上：给定模型的合法执行必须满足由模型的线性代数结构引起的硬件约束不变量，例如内存访问、指令混合和张量核心利用率。 WAVE 收集轻量级 PMC 迹线并应用两阶段管道：（1）从观察到的迹线推断架构属性（例如参数计数、层深度、隐藏维度、批量大小）； (2) 使用基于 SMT 的一致性检查器来评估执行是否与预配置的计算和声明的模型的约束一致。我们在常见的开源 LLM 架构（例如 LLaMA、GPT 和 Qwen）上跨多种 GPU 架构（包括 NVIDIA Ada Lovelace、Hopper 和 Blackwell）评估 WAVE。结果表明，WAVE 以 6.8% 的平均误差恢复了关键模型参数，并识别了现实扰动下的伪装执行。通过对硬件不变量进行基础监督，WAVE 为 LLM 服务的持续、保护隐私的运行时监控提供了实用的途径。

items.title: SpeContext: Enabling Efficient Long-context Reasoning with Speculative Context Sparsity in LLMs.
items.abstract: As test-time scaling in large language model(LLM) reasoning has been proven effective in enhancing the model performance through step-by-step generation, this long-context generation incurs substantial Key-Value(KV) cache, posing a critical bottleneck for practical applications deployment(e.g., Agents). While recent KV cache optimizations perform well in the long-context input scenario, the following problems remain unsolved if directly applied to long-context reasoning. (1) Time-consuming layer-wise retrieval operation. The retrieval operation, which selects the important KV pairs in each layer, brings the synchronization overhead that scales with model depth due to the data dependency, resulting in up to 60% latency overhead. (2) Complete retention of the newly generated KV cache. Existing works designed for long-context input choose to retain the KV pair of newly generated tokens to avoid repeated, time-consuming processing on the KV cache, rendering them ineffective in long-context reasoning. (3) Performance degradation with a tiny increase in sequence length. Existing offloading strategies determined before inference cannot adapt to the increasing sequence length, resulting in >80% performance degradation with a tiny increase in sequence length. In this paper, we point out that the objective of the retrieval algorithms is to align with the LLM, which is similar to the objective of knowledge distillation in LLMs. We analyze the similarity in information focus between the distilled language model(DLM) and the original LLM from the perspective of information theory, and thus propose a novel paradigm that leverages a DLM as the retrieval algorithm. Based on the insight, we present SpeContext, an algorithm and system co-design for long-context reasoning. (1) At the algorithm level, SpeContext proposes lightweight retrieval head based on the head-level attention weights of DLM, achieving >90% parameters reduction by pruning the redundancy. (2) At the system level, SpeContext designs an asynchronous prefetch dataflow via the elastic loading strategy, effectively overlapping KV cache retrieval with the LLM computation. (3) At the compilation level, SpeContext constructs the theoretical memory model and implements an adaptive memory management system to achieve acceleration by maximizing GPU memory utilization. We deploy and evaluate SpeContext in two resource-constrained environments, cloud and edge. Extensive experiments show that, compared with the Huggingface and FlashInfer framework, SpeContext achieves up to 24.89× and 2.19× throughput improvement in cloud and 10.06× and 8.02× speedup in edge with negligible accuracy loss, pushing the Pareto frontier of accuracy and throughput.
items.abstract_zh: 由于大语言模型（LLM）推理中的测试时间扩展已被证明可以通过逐步生成有效地增强模型性能，因此这种长上下文生成会产生大量的键值（KV）缓存，从而为实际应用程序部署（例如代理）带来了关键瓶颈。虽然最近的KV缓存优化在长上下文输入场景中表现良好，但如果直接应用于长上下文推理，以下问题仍然没有解决。 (1)逐层检索操作耗时。检索操作会选择每层中重要的 KV 对，由于数据依赖性，带来的同步开销会随着模型深度的增加而增加，从而导致高达 60% 的延迟开销。 (2) 完整保留新生成的KV缓存。现有的针对长上下文输入设计的作品选择保留新生成的 token 的 KV 对，以避免对 KV 缓存进行重复、耗时的处理，从而导致它们在长上下文推理中无效。 (3) 序列长度的微小增加导致性能下降。推理前确定的现有卸载策略无法适应序列长度的增加，导致序列长度的微小增加导致>80%的性能下降。在本文中，我们指出检索算法的目标是与法学硕士保持一致，这类似于法学硕士知识蒸馏的目标。我们从信息论的角度分析了蒸馏语言模型（DLM）和原始LLM在信息焦点上的相似性，从而提出了一种利用DLM作为检索算法的新范式。基于这一见解，我们提出了 SpeContext，一种用于长上下文推理的算法和系统协同设计。 （1）在算法层面，SpeContext基于DLM的头级注意力权重提出轻量级检索头，通过剪枝冗余实现>90%的参数减少。 (2)在系统层面，SpeContext通过弹性加载策略设计了异步预取数据流，有效地将KV缓存检索与LLM计算重叠。 （3）在编译层面，SpeContext构建了理论内存模型，并实现了自适应内存管理系统，通过最大化GPU内存利用率来实现加速。我们在云和边缘这两个资源受限的环境中部署和评估 SpeContext。大量实验表明，与 Huggingface 和 FlashInfer 框架相比，SpeContext 在云端实现了高达 24.89 倍和 2.19 倍的吞吐量提升，在边缘实现了 10.06 倍和 8.02 倍的加速，而精度损失可以忽略不计，推动了精度和吞吐量的 Pareto 前沿。

items.title: PF-LLM: Large Language Model Hinted Hardware Prefetching.
items.abstract:
Hardware data prefetching is a critical technique for mitigating memory latency in modern processors. While sophisticated hardware prefetching algorithms exist, their exclusive reliance on runtime information limits their ability to adapt quickly and comprehend broader program context. Our key insight is that the optimal prefetching strategy for a load instruction is often discernible from its static code context -- a task at which experienced developers excel. This motivates our central question: can a Large Language Model (LLM) be trained to perform this analysis automatically?

We introduce PF-LLM , an LLM fine-tuned to analyze the assembly context surrounding a load instruction and generate prefetching hints. These offline-generated hints are consumed at runtime by LMHint Prefetcher, a lightweight hardware prefetcher ensemble designed to leverage this static guidance. Our approach boosts the performance of the on-chip hardware prefetcher by moving the hard ''when, how, and how aggressively to prefetch'' decisions out of the runtime hardware and into an offline LLM-powered analysis. This turns the on-chip prefetcher into a zero-latency, oracle-level system that always follows the best prefetching policy for every single load instruction.

Our evaluation shows that our approach achieves a 9.8% instruction-per-cycle (IPC) improvement on average for memory-intensive SPEC 2017 benchmarks over state-of-the-art hardware prefetching baselines and 18.9% improvement on average over state-of-the-art ensemble methods, demonstrating the significant potential of leveraging LLMs to guide microarchitectural decisions.
items.abstract_zh:
硬件数据预取是减少现代处理器内存延迟的一项关键技术。虽然存在复杂的硬件预取算法，但它们对运行时信息的完全依赖限制了它们快速适应和理解更广泛的程序上下文的能力。我们的主要见解是，加载指令的最佳预取策略通常可以从其静态代码上下文中看出——这是经验丰富的开发人员擅长的任务。这引发了我们的核心问题：可以训练大型语言模型（LLM）来自动执行此分析吗？

我们引入了 PF-LLM，这是一种经过微调的 LLM，用于分析加载指令周围的汇编上下文并生成预取提示。这些离线生成的提示由 LMHint Prefetcher 在运行时使用，LMHint Prefetcher 是一个轻量级硬件预取器集合，旨在利用这种静态指导。我们的方法通过将“何时、如何以及如何积极地预取”的硬决策从运行时硬件中移出并转移到由 LLM 驱动的离线分析中，从而提高了片上硬件预取器的性能。这将片上预取器转变为零延迟、预言机级系统，该系统始终遵循每个加载指令的最佳预取策略。

我们的评估表明，与最先进的硬件预取基准相比，我们的方法在内存密集型 SPEC 2017 基准测试中平均每周期指令 (IPC) 提高了 9.8%，与最先进的集成方法相比平均提高了 18.9%，这证明了利用 LLM 指导微架构决策的巨大潜力。

items.title: LPO: Discovering Missed Peephole Optimizations with Large Language Models.
items.abstract:
Peephole optimization is an essential class of compiler optimizations that targets small, inefficient instruction sequences within programs. By replacing such suboptimal instructions with refined and more optimal sequences, these optimizations not only directly optimize code size and performance, but also enable more transformations in the subsequent optimization pipeline. Despite their importance, discovering new and effective peephole optimizations remains challenging due to the complexity and breadth of instruction sets. Prior approaches either lack scalability or have significant restrictions on the peephole optimizations that they can find.

This paper introduces LPO, a novel automated framework to discover missed peephole optimizations. Our key insight is that, Large Language Models (LLMs) are effective at creative exploration but susceptible to hallucinations; conversely, formal verification techniques provide rigorous guarantees but struggle with creative discovery. By synergistically combining the strengths of LLMs and formal verifiers in a closed-loop feedback mechanism, LPO can effectively discover verified peephole optimizations that were previously missed.

We comprehensively evaluated LPO within LLVM ecosystems. Our evaluation shows that LPO can successfully identify up to 22 out of 25 previously reported missed optimizations in LLVM. In contrast, the recently proposed superoptimizers for LLVM, Souper and Minotaur detected 15 and 3 of them, respectively. More importantly, within eleven months of development and intermittent testing, LPO found 62 missed peephole optimizations, of which 28 were confirmed and an additional 13 had already been fixed in LLVM. These results demonstrate LPO's strong potential to continuously uncover new optimizations as LLMs' reasoning improves.
items.abstract_zh:
窥孔优化是一类重要的编译器优化，针对程序中小型、低效的指令序列。通过用精炼和更优化的序列替换此类次优指令，这些优化不仅可以直接优化代码大小和性能，而且可以在后续优化管道中实现更多转换。尽管它们很重要，但由于指令集的复杂性和广度，发现新的有效的窥孔优化仍然具有挑战性。先前的方法要么缺乏可扩展性，要么对它们可以找到的窥孔优化有很大的限制。

本文介绍了 LPO，一种新颖的自动化框架，用于发现错过的窥孔优化。我们的主要见解是，大型语言模型（LLM）在创造性探索方面很有效，但容易产生幻觉；相反，形式验证技术提供严格的保证，但难以创造性发现。通过在闭环反馈机制中协同结合 LLM 和形式验证者的优势，LPO 可以有效地发现之前错过的经过验证的窥孔优化。

我们全面评估了 LLVM 生态系统中的 LPO。我们的评估表明，LPO 可以成功识别 LLVM 中先前报告的 25 个错过的优化中的多达 22 个。相比之下，最近提出的 LLVM、Souper 和 Minotaur 超级优化器分别检测到了 15 个和 3 个。更重要的是，在开发和间歇测试的 11 个月内，LPO 发现了 62 个错过的窥孔优化，其中 28 个已得到确认，另外 13 个已在 LLVM 中修复。这些结果表明，随着法学硕士推理能力的提高，LPO 具有不断发现新优化的强大潜力。

items.title: DIP: Efficient Large Multimodal Model Training with Dynamic Interleaved Pipeline.
items.abstract:
Large multimodal models (LMMs) have demonstrated excellent capabilities in both understanding and generation tasks with various modalities. While these models can accept flexible combinations of input data, their training efficiency suffers from two major issues: pipeline stage imbalance caused by heterogeneous model architectures, and training data dynamicity stemming from the diversity of multimodal data.

In this paper, we present DIP, a dynamic and modality-aware pipeline scheduling framework designed for LMM training. DIP tackles the challenge of dynamic imbalance via two key techniques: (1) separating computations of different modalities into dedicated pipeline segments to balance workloads within a continuous set of stages; (2) dynamically splitting input data into finer-grained, modality-specific sub-microbatches to balance workloads across these segments. By asynchronously generating pipeline schedules on idle CPU resources during training, DIP dynamically tailors stage executions to each input batch without stalling the training process. We validate DIP on a diverse set of five LMMs, ranging from 12B to 94B parameters and including vision-language and diffusion models. Experimental results show that our system achieves up to 97.3% higher throughput compared to state-of-the-art systems, demonstrating strong adaptability to fluctuating multimodal training workloads.
items.abstract_zh:
大型多模态模型（LMM）在理解和生成各种模态任务方面表现出了出色的能力。虽然这些模型可以接受输入数据的灵活组合，但它们的训练效率受到两个主要问题的影响：异构模型架构导致的管道阶段不平衡，以及多模态数据多样性导致的训练数据动态性。

在本文中，我们提出了 DIP，一种专为 LMM 训练而设计的动态且模态感知的管道调度框架。 DIP 通过两项关键技术解决动态不平衡的挑战：（1）将不同模态的计算分离到专用的管道段中，以平衡一组连续阶段内的工作负载； (2) 将输入数据动态分割为更细粒度、特定于模态的子微批次，以平衡这些部分之间的工作负载。通过在训练期间在空闲 CPU 资源上异步生成管道调度，DIP 可以根据每个输入批次动态定制阶段执行，而不会停止训练过程。我们在五个 LMM 的不同集合上验证 DIP，参数范围从 12B 到 94B，包括视觉语言和扩散模型。实验结果表明，与最先进的系统相比，我们的系统吞吐量提高了 97.3%，表现出对波动的多模式训练工作负载的强大适应性。

items.title: WorksetEnclave: Towards Optimizing Cold Starts in Confidential Serverless with Workset-Based Enclave Restore.
items.abstract: Serverless computing has become a popular cloud computing paradigm. However, the increasing demand for data security in serverless applications necessitates the use of Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) such as Intel Software Guard Extensions (SGX). Despite the promise of SGX for secure computation, its adoption in serverless environments is hindered by high startup latencies and excessive Enclave Page Cache (EPC) consumption, particularly during cold starts. This paper identifies the key challenges of SGX in serverless workloads and proposes WorksetEnclave, an efficient optimization method designed to address these issues. WorksetEnclave leverages a snapshot-based approach to optimize both startup time and enclave memory usage. By tracking workset pages used during execution, WorksetEnclave minimizes enclave memory footprints and significantly accelerates enclave restore time during secure checkpointing and recovery. We have implemented two separate prototypes, each based on a different LibOS: Gramine and Occlum. Our evaluation shows that WorksetEnclave accelerates cold start times by 1.9--54× and reduces enclave memory consumption by 13.37--94.87%. Our findings demonstrate that WorksetEnclave significantly improves the performance of confidential serverless.
items.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算已成为流行的云计算范例。然而，无服务器应用程序对数据安全性的需求不断增长，需要使用可信执行环境 (TEE)，例如英特尔软件防护扩展 (SGX)。尽管 SGX 承诺实现安全计算，但其在无服务器环境中的采用受到高启动延迟和过多 Enclave 页面缓存 (EPC) 消耗的阻碍，尤其是在冷启动期间。本文指出了 SGX 在无服务器工作负载中的主要挑战，并提出了 WorksetEnclave，这是一种旨在解决这些问题的高效优化方法。 WorksetEnclave 利用基于快照的方法来优化启动时间和 enclave 内存使用情况。通过跟踪执行期间使用的工作集页面，WorksetEnclave 最大限度地减少了 enclave 内存占用，并在安全检查点和恢复期间显着加快了 enclave 恢复时间。我们实现了两个独立的原型，每个原型都基于不同的 LibOS：Gramine 和 Occlum。我们的评估表明，WorksetEnclave 将冷启动时间加快了 1.9--54 倍，并将 enclave 内存消耗减少了 13.37--94.87%。我们的研究结果表明，WorksetEnclave 显着提高了机密无服务器的性能。

items.title: Reconfigurable Quantum Instruction Set Computers for High Performance Attainable on Hardware.
items.abstract:
Despite remarkable milestones in quantum computing, the performance of current quantum hardware remains limited. One critical path to higher performance is to expand the quantum ISA with basis gates that have higher fidelity and greater synthesis capabilities than the standard CNOT. However, this substantially increases gate calibration overhead and introduces challenges in compiler optimization. Consequently, although more expressive ISAs (even complex, continuous gate sets) have been proposed, they still remain primarily proofs-of-concept and have not been widely adopted.

To move beyond these hurdles and unlock the performance gains offered by expressive continuous ISAs, we introduce the concept of ''reconfigurable quantum instruction set computers'' (ReQISC). It incorporates (1) a unified microarchitecture capable of directly implementing arbitrary 2Q gates equivalently, i.e., SU(4) modulo 1Q rotations, with theoretically optimal gate durations given any 2Q coupling Hamiltonian and (2) a compilation framework tailored to ReQISC primitives for end-to-end synthesis and optimization, comprising a program-aware pass that refines high-level representations, a program-agnostic pass for aggressive circuit-level optimization, and an SU(4)-aware routing pass that minimizes hardware mapping overhead.

We detail the hardware implementation to demonstrate the feasibility of this superior gate scheme in terms of both pulse control and calibration. By leveraging the expressivity of SU(4) and the time minimality realized by the underlying microarchitecture, the SU(4)-based ISA achieves remarkable performance, with a 4.97-fold reduction in average pulse duration to implement arbitrary 2Q gates, compared to the usual CNOT/CZ scheme on mainstream flux-tunable transmons. Supported by the end-to-end compiler, ReQISC outperforms the conventional CNOT-based ISA, state-of-the-art compiler, and pulse implementation counterparts by significantly reducing 2Q gate count, circuit depth, pulse duration, qubit mapping overhead, and program fidelity losses. For the first time, ReQISC makes the theoretical benefits of continuous ISAs practically feasible.
items.abstract_zh:
尽管量子计算取得了显着的里程碑，但当前量子硬件的性能仍然有限。获得更高性能的关键途径之一是使用比标准 CNOT 具有更高保真度和更强综合能力的基础门来扩展量子 ISA。然而，这大大增加了门校准开销，并给编译器优化带来了挑战。因此，尽管已经提出了更具表现力的 ISA（甚至是复杂的、连续的门集），但它们仍然主要是概念验证，尚未得到广泛采用。

为了克服这些障碍并释放富有表现力的连续 ISA 提供的性能增益，我们引入了“可重构量子指令集计算机”(ReQISC) 的概念。它包含 (1) 一个统一的微架构，能够直接等效地实现任意 2Q 门，即 SU(4) 模 1Q 旋转，在给定任何 2Q 耦合哈密顿量的情况下具有理论上最佳的门持续时间，以及 (2) 一个针对 ReQISC 原语定制的编译框架，用于端到端综合和优化，包括一个用于细化高级表示的程序感知通道、一个用于积极电路级优化的程序无关通道以及一个SU(4) 感知路由通道可最大限度地减少硬件映射开销。

我们详细介绍了硬件实现，以证明这种高级门方案在脉冲控制和校准方面的可行性。通过利用 SU(4) 的表现力和底层微架构实现的时间最小化，基于 SU(4) 的 ISA 实现了卓越的性能，与主流磁通可调传输器上常见的 CNOT/CZ 方案相比，实现任意 2Q 门的平均脉冲持续时间减少了 4.97 倍。在端到端编译器的支持下，ReQISC 显着减少了 2Q 门数、电路深度、脉冲持续时间、量子位映射开销和程序保真度损失，从而优于传统的基于 CNOT 的 ISA、最先进的编译器和脉冲实现同类产品。 ReQISC 首次使连续 ISA 的理论优势在实践中变得可行。

items.title: gShare: Efficient GPU Sharing with Aggressive Scheduling in Multi-tenant FaaS platform.
items.abstract: Serving ML models with serverless computing has become increasingly popular in recent years. Many of today's cloud vendors have provided GPU functions to meet the performance requirements of different ML scenarios. However, existing production FaaS platforms suffer from GPU under-utilization and high cloud costs due to poor GPU resource management. In this paper, we propose gShare, an on-demand and efficient GPU function management policy in FaaS platforms. gShare provides a fine-grained GPU virtualization solution for a VM-based multi-tenant FaaS environment. It further decouples the GPU resource from the existing CPU-oriented function management paradigm, enabling flexible GPU sharing across tenants. With a user-transparent vGPU remapping design and aggressive request scheduling policy, gShare can significantly improve the cost-efficiency of GPU functions without causing appreciable function performance degradation. Experimental results show that gShare can reduce GPU usage by 43%–63% compared to the baseline while meeting more than 95% of user latency targets. Compared with the state-of-the-art method, it can also reduce cloud costs by 24%-58% while maintaining better function performance, benefiting both the cloud provider and users.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，通过无服务器计算提供机器学习模型变得越来越流行。当今许多云供应商都提供了GPU功能来满足不同ML场景的性能要求。然而，现有的生产 FaaS 平台因 GPU 资源管理不善而面临 GPU 利用率不足和云成本高昂的问题。在本文中，我们提出了 gShare，一种 FaaS 平台中按需且高效的 GPU 功能管理策略。 gShare为基于VM的多租户FaaS环境提供了细粒度的GPU虚拟化解决方案。它将GPU资源与现有的面向CPU的功能管理范式进一步解耦，实现跨租户灵活的GPU共享。凭借用户透明的vGPU重映射设计和积极的请求调度策略，gShare可以显着提高GPU功能的成本效率，而不会导致明显的功能性能下降。实验结果表明，与基线相比，gShare 可以减少 GPU 使用率 43%–63%，同时满足 95% 以上的用户延迟目标。与最先进的方法相比，它还可以在保持更好的功能性能的同时降低云成本24%-58%，使云提供商和用户都受益。

items.title: JOSer: Just-In-Time Object Serialization for Heavy Java Serialization Workloads.
items.abstract: Object serialization is critical in Java, which preserves objects in memory and transfers them among software systems if needed. However, the serialization techniques of modern Java systems are usually inflexible and inefficient under heavy serialization workloads, as they rely on manually-defined object schemas or omni-functional serializers. To tackle the above problem, we reveal a novel, serialization-specific optimization opportunity in Java. Based on it, we develop JOSer ( Just-in-time Object SERializer ), an efficient, Just-in-Time (JIT) object serialization technique. At runtime, JOSer generates a set of class-specific, JIT-friendly object serializers ( i.e., serialization code), and then continuously optimizes them with the JIT compiler of Java Virtual Machine (JVM). JOSer also shares the metadata of objects under serialization and the serializers under optimization. We evaluate JOSer against six Java serialization techniques including OpenJDK's built-in serialization technique. Overall, JOSer improves the throughput by up to 20~83× in serialization and 43~229× in deserialization. JOSer has been successfully deployed in real-world products, reducing serialization CPU usage of Flink by 35.32~41.14% and latency of search recommendations by 30+ ms. JOSer grounds Apache Fory#8482;, an open-source serialization framework available at https://fory.apache.org/.
items.abstract_zh: 对象序列化在 Java 中至关重要，它将对象保存在内存中，并在需要时在软件系统之间传输它们。然而，现代 Java 系统的序列化技术在繁重的序列化工作负载下通常不灵活且效率低下，因为它们依赖于手动定义的对象模式或全功能序列化器。为了解决上述问题，我们在 Java 中揭示了一种新颖的、特定于序列化的优化机会。在此基础上，我们开发了JOSer（Just-in-time Object SERializer），一种高效的Just-in-Time（JIT）对象序列化技术。在运行时，JOSer生成一组特定于类的、JIT友好的对象序列化器（即序列化代码），然后使用Java虚拟机（JVM）的JIT编译器不断优化它们。 JOSer 还共享序列化下的对象和优化下的序列化器的元数据。我们针对六种 Java 序列化技术（包括 OpenJDK 的内置序列化技术）来评估 JOSer。总体而言，JOSer 在序列化方面将吞吐量提高了 20~83 倍，在反序列化方面提高了 43~229 倍。 JOSer 已成功部署在实际产品中，将 Flink 序列化 CPU 占用率降低 35.32~41.14%，搜索推荐延迟降低 30+ms。 JOSer 基于 Apache Fory#8482;，这是一个开源序列化框架，可在 https://fory.apache.org/ 上找到。

items.title: Highly Automated Verification of Security Properties for Unmodified System Software.
items.abstract: System software is often complex and hides exploitable security vulnerabilities. Formal verification promises bug-free software but comes with a prohibitive proof cost. We present Spoq2, the first verification framework to highly automate security verification of unmodified system software. Spoq2 is based on the observation that many security properties, such as noninterference, can be reduced to establishing inductive invariants on individual transitions of a transition system that models system software. However, directly verifying such invariants for real system code overwhelms existing SMT solvers. Spoq2 makes this possible by automatically reducing verification complexity. It decomposes transitions into individual execution paths, extends cone-of-influence analysis to the individual transition level, and eliminates irrelevant machine states, clauses, and control-flow paths before invoking the SMT solver. Spoq2 further optimizes how pointer operations are modeled and verified through pointer abstractions that eliminate expensive bit-wise operations from SMT queries. We demonstrate the effectiveness of Spoq2 by verifying security properties of four unmodified, real-world system codebases with minimal manual effort.
items.abstract_zh: 系统软件通常很复杂并且隐藏着可利用的安全漏洞。形式验证承诺软件不会出现错误，但其证明成本却令人望而却步。我们推出了 Spoq2，这是第一个对未修改的系统软件进行高度自动化安全验证的验证框架。 Spoq2 基于这样的观察：许多安全属性（例如不干扰）可以简化为在对系统软件进行建模的转换系统的各个转换上建立归纳不变量。然而，直接验证真实系统代码的此类不变量会压垮现有的 SMT 求解器。 Spoq2 通过自动降低验证复杂性使这成为可能。它将转换分解为单独的执行路径，将影响​​锥分析扩展到单独的转换级别，并在调用 SMT 求解器之前消除不相关的机器状态、子句和控制流路径。 Spoq2 通过指针抽象进一步优化了指针操作的建模和验证方式，消除了 SMT 查询中昂贵的按位操作。我们通过以最少的手动操作验证四个未经修改的真实系统代码库的安全属性来证明 Spoq2 的有效性。

items.title: Compass: Navigating the Design Space of Taint Schemes for RTL Security Verification.
items.abstract:
Hardware information flow tracking (IFT) using taint analysis provides a methodology to check whether a hardware design satisfies certain security properties. Previous work has shown a broad trade-off space between precision and complexity when using different taint analysis schemes. A careful investigation of this space has led to the insight that applying different taint schemes to different components of a hardware design can improve overall efficiency.

We present Compass , a systematic framework to guide users in designing appropriate taint schemes that are as lightweight as possible while still sufficient to accomplish their security verification goals. We first establish a unified terminology to comprehensively capture existing taint schemes. We then apply counterexample-guided abstraction refinement (CEGAR) for taint refinement to iteratively improve the taint scheme. We evaluated Compass on a set of open-source RISCV processors to verify the information flow properties for speculative execution vulnerabilities, and demonstrate that Compass significantly improves both simulation speed and formal-verification scalability of taint analysis.
items.abstract_zh:
使用污点分析的硬件信息流跟踪 (IFT) 提供了一种检查硬件设计是否满足某些安全属性的方法。先前的工作已经表明，在使用不同的污点分析方案时，精度和复杂性之间存在广泛的权衡空间。通过对该领域的仔细研究，我们发现将不同的污点方案应用于硬件设计的不同组件可以提高整体效率。

我们提出了 Compass，一个系统框架，用于指导用户设计适当的污点方案，该方案尽可能轻量级，同时仍足以实现其安全验证目标。我们首先建立一个统一的术语来全面捕获现有的污点方案。然后，我们应用反例引导的抽象细化（CEGAR）进行污点细化，以迭代改进污点方案。我们在一组开源 RISCV 处理器上评估了 Compass，以验证推测执行漏洞的信息流属性，并证明 Compass 显着提高了污点分析的模拟速度和形式验证可扩展性。

items.title: Nemo: A Low-Write-Amplification Cache for Tiny Objects on Log-Structured Flash Devices.
items.abstract: Modern storage systems predominantly use flash-based SSDs as a cache layer due to their favorable performance and cost efficiency. However, in tiny-object workloads, existing flash cache designs still suffer from high write amplification. Even when deploying advanced log-structured flash devices (e.g., Zoned Namespace SSDs and Flexible Data Placement SSDs) with low device-level write amplification, application-level write amplification still dominates. This work proposes Nemo, which enhances set-associative cache design by increasing hash collision probability to improve set fill rate, thereby reducing application-level write amplification. To satisfy caching requirements, including high memory efficiency and low miss ratio, we introduce a Bloom filter-based indexing mechanism that significantly reduces memory overhead, and adopt a hybrid hotness tracking to achieve low miss ratio without losing memory efficiency. Experimental results show that Nemo simultaneously achieves three key objectives for flash cache: low write amplification, high memory efficiency, and low miss ratio.
items.abstract_zh: 现代存储系统主要使用基于闪存的 SSD 作为缓存层，因为它们具有良好的性能和成本效率。然而，在微小对象工作负载中，现有的闪存缓存设计仍然面临高写入放大的问题。即使部署具有低设备级写入放大的高级日志结构闪存设备（例如，分区命名空间 SSD 和灵活数据放置 SSD），应用程序级写入放大仍然占主导地位。这项工作提出了 Nemo，它通过增加哈希冲突概率来增强集合关联缓存设计，以提高集合填充率，从而减少应用程序级写入放大。为了满足缓存要求，包括高内存效率和低丢失率，我们引入了基于布隆过滤器的索引机制，显着降低了内存开销，并采用混合热度跟踪来实现低丢失率而不损失内存效率。实验结果表明，Nemo 同时实现了闪存缓存的三个关键目标：低写入放大、高内存效率和低丢失率。

items.title: CoGraf: Fully Accelerating Graph Applications with Fine-Grained PIM.
items.abstract:
Processing-in-Memory (PIM) delivers enormous performance by taking advantage of internal DRAM bandwidth and parallelism. However, graph applications are difficult to adapt to PIM due to their irregular access patterns.
